title: Corporate Travel Consultant
description:
Corporate Travel Consultant (Remote – Philippines)

Location: Remote – Philippines

Arrangement: Full-time, 40 hours per week



About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Corporate Travel Consultant to support non-client-facing corporate travel operations. This role will focus on corporate booking assistance, queue management, and back-office travel administration, while client-facing consultants remain in-house.



The successful candidate will work closely with the internal team and provide operational support to ensure travel bookings and administrative processes are handled accurately and efficiently.



Key Responsibilities



Corporate Travel Support

- Assist with travel bookings and reservations where required

- Prepare and manage booking records within GDS systems

Prepare accurate corporate travel quotations when requested

Manage and monitor travel booking queues

Process fulfilments, amendments, reissues, and cancellations

Generate and transact from basic operational or booking reports to support the internal team (including uninvoiced, unreceipted fees, and bookings status reports)

Ensure compliance with client travel policies

Maintain booking accuracy and documentation standards



Back-Office Administration



Reconcile booking financials

Manage supplier confirmations and ticketing follow-ups

Support workflow tracking via 
 (or internal systems)

Update CRM systems (if applicable)

Maintain detailed records of transactions and communications

Assist with reporting and operational documentation



Systems & Tools



Work within internal travel and operational systems, including (but not limited to):

Tramada (where applicable)

Amadeus


 (task tracking)

HubSpot CRM



Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of experience in corporate travel or travel administration

Strong quoting and fare construction knowledge

Experience managing booking queues

High attention to detail and accuracy

Experience using travel systems – Amadeus (GDS and mid-office systems preferred)

Familiarity with Tramada is highly desirable

Comfortable working in a non-client-facing support capacity

Strong English writing and communication skills

Ability to work independently in a remote setup

title: Bodycam Footage Researcher for Youtube Channel
description:
We’re building a growing YouTube channel focused on real-life Body cam incidents, and we’re looking for a reliable footage researcher. Your job will be to find 2–5+ hour raw body cam footage from police cases across the USA.



Responsibilities:



Research and find New body cam footage from police cases in the USA



Contact the police department or appropriate source to request access to footage



Use professional, well-written
s (we can provide templates via ChatGPT)



Track all cases in a clear spreadsheet/database



Deliver daily research updates



Requirements:



Experience in research, law enforcement databases, or similar fields is a plus



Strong communication and attention to detail



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Compensation:



$20 per footage found



*Extra pay if you have previous experience in sourcing or know the process professionally!!*

title: Experienced B2B Telemarketer
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center.  We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it!  You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base 

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected.  We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: Meta ad creative for local business
description:
We run
 and Instagram ads for local service businesses such as:

 • Landscaping companies

 • Cleaning companies

 • Gutter cleaning companies

 • Personal trainers

 • Training programs



We are looking for a creative editor who can produce Meta ad creatives quickly, including video ads, image ads, and AI-assisted content.



This role can turn into ongoing work if the first projects go well.



?



Immediate Task



We are looking for someone who can start right away.



There are a few ad creatives that need to be produced within the next 12–15 hours. If the work is strong and turnaround is fast, this will likely lead to regular creative work moving forward.



?



What You’ll Be Doing



You will create
 and Instagram ad creatives, including:

 • Short video ads (15–40 seconds)

 • Image ads with text overlays

 • Multiple variations of ads for testing

 • Captioned videos and motion text

 • Turning raw clips or photos into ad creatives



These are lead generation ads for local businesses, so the style is usually simple, clear, and direct.



?



AI Experience is Important



We are looking for someone comfortable using AI tools to speed up production and improve creative output.



Examples include:

 • AI voiceovers for ads

 • AI caption generation

 • AI video editing assistance

 • AI image generation or enhancement

 • AI background cleanup or voice cleanup



Experience with AI voiceover tools is a strong plus.



?



Tools (Examples)



Helpful experience with:

 • CapCut

 • Premiere Pro

 • After Effects (basic)

 • Canva

 • AI creative tools

 • AI voiceover platforms



?



What We’re Looking For



You are likely a good fit if you:

 • Have experience creating
 / Instagram ad creatives

 • Can produce clean ads quickly

 • Understand attention hooks in the first few seconds

 • Can create multiple variations for testing

 • Are reliable and responsive



?



Compensation



Open to:

 • Hourly

 • Per creative

 • Trial project



If the first projects go well, this can turn into consistent weekly work.



?



To Apply



Please include:

 1. A link to your portfolio or past ad creatives

 2. Examples of video ads you edited

 3. Any examples of AI voiceover work (if available)

 4. What editing and AI tools you use

 5. Your hourly rate

 6. Your availability today



Please include the phrase “Creative Ready” in your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: eBay Store Setup & Listing Migration Specialist (Etsy ? eBay)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented eCommerce assistant to fully set up our eBay store and migrate our listings from Etsy.



The Project (16-20 hours total)



We need someone to set up our eBay store from start to finish and copy our existing Etsy listings to eBay while optimizing them for the platform.



We will create the eBay business account, but everything else should be configured professionally.



This includes:



• eBay store setup

• Shipping profiles

• Payment settings

• Store categories

• Listing templates

• Listing migration from Etsy



This is a one-time project initially, but could lead to ongoing listing management work.



Scope of Work



1?? Full eBay Store Setup

Set up the eBay store properly for a vintage/antiques brand.



Tasks include:

• Configure store settings

• Set up shipping policies

• Set up return policies

• Configure payment settings

• Create store categories for our product types

• Create listing templates for consistency

• Ensure everything is optimized for US buyers



2?? Listing Migration (Etsy ? eBay)

You will copy our existing listings from Etsy into eBay.



For each listing:

• Copy listing title and optimize for eBay SEO

• Copy description and adjust formatting if needed

• Upload product photos

• Add item specifics

• Select appropriate category

• Add item condition (vintage / used)

• Set price

• Assign shipping profile



We currently have 50+ listings, with more added regularly.



3?? Listing Optimization

Make sure listings follow best practices for eBay search visibility.



This includes:

• Proper keyword formatting

• Correct categories

• Item specifics filled out properly

• Vintage item tagging where applicable



Deliverables



By the end of the project:

? Fully functional eBay store

? Store categories created

? Shipping and return policies configured

? Listing template created

? All Etsy listings copied to eBay

? Listings saved as drafts or published (depending on instruction)



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:

? Has experience setting up eBay stores

? Understands eBay SEO and listing structure

? Has experience with product listing migration (Etsy, Shopify, etc.)

? Is detail-oriented and organized

? Speaks and writes excellent English



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Vintage / antiques categories

• Etsy ? eBay listing migration

• eCommerce VA work



Estimated Project Size



Approximately:

100 listings



Typical listing setup time:

10–20 minutes per listing



Compensation: 20 hours total, $200 flat project rate.

title: CASA Drone Theoretical Teacher
description:
About the Company



iDrone Train, a division of iDrone Corp, is one of Australia’s leading drone training organisations delivering the Remote Pilot Licence (RePL) under the regulations of the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA).



We train commercial drone pilots across Australia in industries such as construction, surveying, agriculture, and industrial cleaning. As part of our expansion, we are looking for a Drone Aviation Theory Instructor to assist in delivering the theoretical component of the Remote Pilot Licence (RePL) course online.



This is a fully remote position with the opportunity to work with a rapidly growing international drone technology company.



Role Overview



We are seeking a technically minded instructor to deliver the theoretical aviation training component of our drone pilot certification program via online classes and webinars.



The instructor will guide students through aviation theory including airspace, regulations, drone systems, meteorology, and operational safety.



All practical flight training and final licensing approvals will be handled by our Australian instructors.



Responsibilities



Deliver live online training sessions covering:



Australian drone regulations (CASA Part 101)



Airspace and aviation rules



Weather and meteorology for drone operations



Human factors and aviation safety



Drone systems and flight planning



Operational risk management



Additional responsibilities:



Answer student questions during training sessions



Conduct theory knowledge checks and quizzes



Assist with student onboarding and course support



Maintain high-quality training standards



Work closely with our Australian aviation team



Requirements



Essential:



Strong English speaking ability (clear neutral accent)



Strong presentation and teaching skills



Comfortable speaking to groups via Zoom or Google Meet



Strong technical understanding or interest in drones, aviation, or engineering



Reliable high-speed internet connection



Professional home office setup



Preferred:



Background in aviation, drones, engineering, or aviation training



Experience teaching technical subjects



Familiarity with drone flight operations



Experience with online training platforms or LMS systems



Bonus (not required):



Drone pilot experience



Aviation training background



Flight simulation or UAV experience



Training Provided



Successful applicants will receive full training on:



Australian drone regulations



iDrone Train training materials



Our drone training syllabus



Aviation theory modules



Long-term employment opportunity



Opportunity to grow into a Senior Aviation Instructor role



Work Schedule



Remote (Philippines)

Working with Australian students



Typical hours:



Part-time or full-time available



Training sessions typically run during Australian daytime hours



Why Work With Us



Work with one of Australia’s fastest growing drone companies



Join a company operating across multiple drone sectors including training, industrial cleaning, and heavy-lift operations



Work with cutting-edge drone technology



Opportunity for long-term career growth

s and phone calls

title: Property Manager
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. You’ll be the primary point of contact for clients and will coordinate with vendors, leasing, maintenance, and occasionally vendors to keep properties performing well and clients confident. We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. This is an execution and communication role. In this role your mantra will be systems, clean notes, accurate records, fast follow-through, proactive updates, and clear reporting. We operate with a “Good Data In  Great Results Out” methodology. Your ability to maintain accurate information and turn it into great decisions matters.





What You’ll Be Doing





1) Client Management & Communication



Conduct onboarding calls and set expectations using our Good Data In  Great Results Out approach.



Maintain detailed notes of all client communications both inbound & outbound.



Provide proactive outreach: portfolio updates and recommendations build productive relationships.



Respond to escalated client
s within SLA timeframes.



Obtain client approvals per policy before authorizing work.





2) Portfolio Operations, Leasing & Vacancy Control



Monitor vacancies and review showing/leasing reports weekly with clients and provide recommendations focused on keeping DOM low and increasing Resident retention. 



Setting rental rates using our Rental Analysis methodology.



Oversee unit turns to ensure they’re completed quickly and cost-effectively.







3) Maintenance & Vendor Coordination



Oversee maintenance workflows: requests, vendor coordination, approval ( If needed), completion close-out.



Oversee work orders documentation accuracy( notes, photos, invoices, approvals).



Follow up on open items to ensure tasks close and do not stall.



Review vendor performance and escalate recurring issues with a focus on a final resolution. 





4) Financial Oversight



Review and collect outstanding client payables in a timely manner.



Secure client funds as needed before approving work orders or expenses.



Review monthly owner statements for accuracy prior to dissemination.



Oversee legal filings against delinquent Residents. 







5) Compliance & Documentation



Maintain working knowledge of rental compliance basics and follow internal compliance checklists.



Ensure client and property compliance with all federal, state, and local regulations 



Store all client/property documents correctly using HWPM’s internal file structure.





How You’ll Be Measured



Collections: 90%+ of client payables collected within 45 days



Client Response Time: 90% of escalated client
s resolved within SLA



Owner Statements: 90% Accuracy in statement review before dissemination



Days on Market: Maintain DOM under 45 days for vacant units



Unit Turns: 95% of turns completed within 14 days of vacancy



Compliance: 100% of rental/lead registrations completed on time



Client Retention: Maintain 90%+ annual client retention







Requirements

Required Skills & Experience

2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).



Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.



Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.



Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.



Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred



Bachelor's Degree  



Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.



You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.



You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.



Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.







Benefits

Compensation & Benefits

Probation Period- 12 weeks 200.00 per week. 



Post-Probation Full-time:



$280–$360/week ($1120-$1440) plus bonuses.

Based on performance & experience.



Paid Time Off (PTO): 



Accrues at 1 day per month 



Sick leave 5 Days per year 



13th Month Pay (Performance-Based)



Birthday Leave (Paid)



Philippine Government Reimbursements:

SSS: Up to ?2,400/month

PhilHealth: Up to ?800/month

Pag-IBIG: Up to ?800/month



Health Insurance Card



Language Bonus:



-Spanish fluency incentive



*Items 3,4,5,6, and 7 begin at the 6th month mark of employment. 



Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).

Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.

Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.

Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.

Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred.

Comfortable with task/project tools Zoho crm is preferred. 

Bachelor's Degree  

Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.

You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.

You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.

Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.



Our Core Values

Accountability: We own and learn from mistakes.

Growth: In mindset, skill, and service.

Innovation: We always ask, “How can we do this better?”

Teamwork: We support each other to succeed.

Urgency: We act with intention and finish strong.

Communication: Clear, respectful, and frequent.

title: Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator (Remote)
description:
We are a leading pole fitness company with multiple studio locations across Melbourne, Australia. Our mission is to empower people through the art of pole dancing by promoting fitness, confidence, self expression and body positivity.



Alongside our studios, we run a growing online store selling pole dance equipment, apparel and accessories to customers across Australia and internationally.



We also work with a remote team based in the Philippines who play an important role in our operations, marketing and customer experience.



We are now looking for an experienced Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator to help manage and grow our online store.



This role is ideal for someone who understands how to run promotions, manage product launches, grow
 marketing and build an engaged social media presence while keeping the Shopify store organised and performing well.



You will work closely with our marketing and leadership team to execute campaigns, manage the store, coordinate with suppliers and help drive online sales.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify Store Management

Manage and maintain our Shopify store including product listings, product descriptions, pricing, images and collections.

Ensure all product information is accurate and presented in a way that maximises conversions and customer experience.

Organise products, collections and promotions inside Shopify to support marketing campaigns and seasonal offers.



 Marketing & Promotions

Plan and execute
 marketing campaigns using platforms such as Klaviyo or similar tools.

Create promotional campaigns around product launches, seasonal sales and special offers.

Segment audiences and track performance to continually improve open rates, engagement and sales conversions.



Social Media Management

Manage and grow our Instagram presence for the online store.

Plan and schedule posts that promote products, highlight customers and showcase the pole fitness lifestyle.

Coordinate social media promotions, product highlights and campaign launches.



Product & Supplier Coordination

Communicate with suppliers regarding product availability, inventory updates and new product opportunities.

Coordinate product launches including uploading products, preparing marketing assets and supporting promotional campaigns.

Ensure the store is always well stocked and up to date with the latest products.



Performance Tracking

Monitor store performance using Shopify analytics and marketing tools.

Track sales, campaign performance and customer behaviour to identify opportunities to increase conversions.

Provide regular insights and suggestions to improve promotions and marketing strategies.



Requirements

Proven experience managing or working with Shopify stores from a marketing and promotions perspective

Experience running
 marketing campaigns and promotional sales

Strong understanding of Instagram marketing and social media content for e-commerce

Experience uploading and managing products, collections and promotions inside Shopify

Strong written English and clear communication skills

Highly organised with strong attention to detail

Ability to work independently in a remote environment while collaborating with the team

Experience working with suppliers or managing product inventory is highly regarded

Bonus if you have experience with pole fitness, dance, fitness brands or lifestyle brands



Why Join Our Team

You will be working with a passionate and growing brand that is changing lives through pole fitness.

Our team values creativity, independence and people who take initiative.

This is an opportunity to play an important role in growing our online store and building a brand that supports thousands of students and customers around the world.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your resume

A short introduction about yourself

Examples of Shopify stores, campaigns or brands you have worked with (if available)



Tell us about your experience managing Shopify stores,
 marketing or online promotions, and how you could help grow our online store.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:

Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

s that get opened, read, and clicked

s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do

s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process

We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed

- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines

title: Credit Card Chargeback Manager (Dropshipping)
description:

In this role, you will manage and respond to credit card chargebacks (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), prepare strong representment packages, and help maximize our dispute win rate. We are looking for someone who understands how issuing banks evaluate cases and knows how to build compelling evidence.



Responsibilities



• Manage and respond to credit card chargebacks

• Prepare strong representment evidence

• Analyze reason codes and structure responses accordingly

• Track case outcomes and win rates

• Identify patterns and help reduce future chargebacks



Requirements



• Experience handling credit card chargebacks for e-commerce

• Proven track record of winning chargeback cases

• Experience with representment and compelling evidence

• Familiar with Shopify Payments, Stripe, or similar processors

• Strong analytical and documentation skills

title: Marketing Executive | Remote | UK Property Company
description:
Work From Home | Long Term Career Growth | AI, Content, SEO and Paid Ads



Bi-weekly Pay



Luxury Hub and Pure Green are fast growing UK based property companies managing over £20m in assets and securing £30m in investment funding for future developments.



We operate at the intersection of property, technology, performance marketing and social impact, delivering modern estate agency and lettings services across the UK.



We are expanding our Philippines based team and are hiring a Marketing Executive for a long term, full time role focused on execution, performance and continuous improvement.



This role is ideal for someone who is tech savvy, design aware, comfortable with AI and happy to be hands on across content, SEO,
, website updates and automation.



WHY JOIN US



• Work remotely for a stable UK based company

• Long term role with guaranteed hours and job security

• Real campaigns with real budgets

• Daily use of AI tools including ChatGPT, Canva AI and CapCut AI

• Exposure to UK marketing strategy, funnels and performance data

• Work closely with senior leadership including CMO and Operations

• Clear progression as the business scales

• Annual performance review with potential pay increase



We invest in our people. You will get support and systems to help you grow your skills and confidence, not just complete tasks.



OUR CULTURE AND VALUES



At Luxury Hub, culture matters. We are building a long term team, not short term contractors.



Our core values are:



• Shared Vision – Aligning personal ambition with company success and shared goals

• Virtue and Talents – Individual talents are recognised and nurtured

• Continuous Improvement – We welcome feedback, stay curious, innovate and improve

• Focused Contribution – We play to our strengths and passions to create real impact

• Meaningful Partnerships – We believe in mutual value creation and growing together



We are looking for people who want to build something meaningful, grow their skills and contribute beyond just completing tasks.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Marketing and Campaign Execution



• Execute weekly and monthly marketing campaigns across digital channels

• Manage and maintain marketing action lists and content calendars

• Create marketing assets, posts and supporting materials

• Research trends, competitors and opportunities across social platforms



Paid Advertising



• Assist with Meta Ads and Google Display campaigns

• Create ad creatives, hooks, captions and visuals

• Monitor CPL, CTR and conversions

• Suggest and apply optimisations



SEO, GEO and Website Updates



• Support basic SEO and GEO tasks including on page optimisation, content updates and metadata

• Carry out basic website updates such as CMS edits, landing pages and content changes

• Work with the team to improve website performance and conversion



AI, Automation and Continuous Improvement



• Use AI tools daily to generate content ideas, captions, scripts, designs and workflows

• Identify opportunities to automate or improve marketing processes using AI

• Continuously look for ways to work smarter and faster



 Campaigns, CRM and Reporting



• Support
 campaigns, outbound
ing and basic automations

• Maintain and update CRM records

• Track leads, campaigns and sources

• Support basic marketing performance reporting



Brand and Quality Control



• Maintain strict brand consistency

• Continuously improve output quality across all channels



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We are skills first, not CV first.



You should have:



• Design Experience in a design tool.  InDesign or Adobe Photoshop, Canva.

• Demonstrable experience in digital marketing, content creation, SEO or paid ads

• Strong Canva skills and a good design eye

• Ability to edit short form videos using CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar tools

• Confidence using AI tools daily

• Comfort working with website backends or CMS and learning new tools quickly

• Strong written English

• A proactive, improvement focused mindset

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Availability to work UK hours from 9 AM to 5 PM GMT

• No other full time job or full time study commitments



A portfolio or examples of previous work is required.



COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS



• PHP 318 to 330 per hour based on skills and portfolio

• Bi weekly pay

• Paid time off

• KPI based performance bonuses of up to PHP 35 per hour extra

• Annual performance and pay review



Guaranteed pay security

If we do not provide enough work, you will still be paid for at least 75 percent of your contracted hours.



As the company grows, we plan to introduce:



• Thirteenth month pay

• Fourteenth month performance bonus after three years

• Bonus days off every 80 hours worked after probation

• Health stipend of up to PHP 2,000 per month after two years

• Increased leave credits

• Expanded long term benefits

• Company loan options after two years



HOW TO APPLY



• Complete this short application form: 

• No CV required at this stage. Portfolio will be reviewed.



 Join us and grow your career with a UK-based real estate company. We will be accepting applications until 10th March 2026, 11:59 PM GMT.

title: German-Speaking Software Sales Specialist
description:
We are looking for a motivated and results-driven German-speaking sales professional to join our team. The ideal candidate has a strong background in technology or software sales for at least 2 years and is passionate about building relationships, understanding client needs, and delivering effective solutions.



In this role, you will be responsible for identifying potential clients, and guiding prospects through the sales process. You will play a key role in expanding our presence in the market.



Key Responsibilities: 

- Conduct cold calls and outreach to generate new leads and sales opportunities

- Present and promote our technology/software solutions to prospective clients

- Build and maintain strong relationships with clients

- Meet or exceed sales targets and contribute to business growth

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth client onboarding



About the Company:



HIPERSA implements highly efficient acquisition processes – supported by automation and artificial intelligence. Our goal is excellence.



We have already helped over 100 B2B service providers achieve five- to six-figure monthly revenues – with a customer rating of 9.4/10 for our service.



Our experience stems from managing over 300 client projects, working with renowned agencies, and over 10 years of experience in software development for medium-sized businesses and corporations such as Thyssenkrupp.

description:

Work with RingCould as a Customer Service Representative. Gain hands-on experience, support fast-growing online brands, work fully remotely, and build a long-term career in eCommerce.



What You Will Be Doing

• Provide customer support via phone, chat, and email

• Assist customers with orders, questions, and product issues

• Turn challenges into opportunities to create a great customer experience

• 1+ year of customer service experience

Who We Are

title: QA Analyst
description:
Join Our Remote Team as a Quality Assurance Analyst



We are looking for a detail-oriented QA Analyst to evaluate customer interactions including calls, emails, and live chats. You will ensure quality standards, submit reports, and handle data entry to help our team deliver excellent customer experiences.



(Salary Package: PHP 19,000–23,000 per month (negotiable only within this range; if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply))



What You’ll Be Doing

• Monitor and evaluate customer interactions for quality and accuracy

• Submit QA reports and maintain accurate records

• Perform related data entry tasks

• Provide constructive feedback to improve team performance



What We’re Looking For

• 1+ year experience in QA, customer service, or operational support

• Strong ability to follow SOPs, templates, and structured workflows

• Excellent attention to detail for consistent QA evaluations and documentation

• Good written and reading English communication skills

• Disciplined and reliable, able to perform in high-volume BPO environments

• Stable internet and quiet home workspace

• Backup device and power source

title: Etsy Product Listing Assistant (Vintage & Antique Home Decor) – ChatGPT + Simple Workflow
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help create product listings for our Etsy store.



Our brand sells curated vintage and antique decor pieces sourced from Crete and the Mediterranean. The role involves turning our product information into polished Etsy listings using a simple template.



This is a structured workflow task, and you will be provided with everything needed:



- Product spreadsheet

- Photo links

- Listing template

- Instructions for using ChatGPT to generate optimized listing text



Your job is primarily to assemble the listing and save it as a draft in Etsy.

This role will start as a short-term project to prepare 50 listings, with potential for long-term ongoing work if it’s a good fit.



Responsibilities



You will follow a simple process:



Step 1 – Review Product Spreadsheet

- We provide a spreadsheet that contains:

- Product name

- Basic item details

- Measurements

- Category

- Notes

- Link to product photos



Step 2 – Generate Listing Content

- Using our listing template, you will:

- Use ChatGPT to generate SEO-optimized text

- Fill in product details

- Create the listing title

- Write the item description

- Add tags and attributes

- You will receive clear instructions for how we structure listings.



Step 3 – Create Listing in Etsy

You will:

- Upload the product photos

- Paste the listing content

- Add tags and attributes

- Save the listing as Draft



You will NOT publish listings unless instructed.



Output Expectations



Initial Project:



Prepare 50 Etsy listings

Each listing typically takes 15–20 minutes once you understand the workflow.



Required:

Excellent written English

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow templates and instructions

Comfortable using ChatGPT or AI tools

Basic understanding of Etsy listings or e-commerce



Preferred (but not required):

Experience with Etsy product listings

Experience with SEO keywords

Interest in vintage, antiques, or home decor



You will be working with:

- Google Sheets

- ChatGPT

- Etsy Seller Dashboard

- Google Drive



Compensation

Fixed Project Rate:

$90 for 50 completed listings

If the project is successful, we will continue with ongoing work creating 14 listings per week.

title: Migration Paralegal & Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Migration Paralegal & Administrative Assistant to support a busy migration practice. This role is primarily focused on end-to-end case support using Migration Manager, including document collection, drafting support, application preparation, and internal coordination.



The successful candidate must be confident working independently, highly organised, and able to communicate clearly and proactively. Accuracy and critical thinking are essential, as migration work requires careful document review and strong attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities



Migration Casework Support (Primary)



Provide high-quality paralegal support to migration agents/lawyers and administrative leadership.

Manage casework in Migration Manager end-to-end (non-negotiable):

Create/maintain matters, contacts, and workflows

Upload, organise, and label documents and evidence

Maintain file notes, correspondence logs, and task tracking



Draft and/or prepare:



Client correspondence and document requests

Letters, checklists, statements, and supporting documentation packs

Draft submissions/templates as directed

Assist in preparing sponsorship, nomination and visa-related applications and supporting packs with a strong quality control mindset, ensuring accuracy and completeness.

Review client-provided documents critically and flag issues early (missing items, inconsistencies, poor-quality references, unclear evidence).

Ensure all assigned tasks are completed by agreed deadlines and aligned to client critical dates.



Administration & Back-Office Support



Prepare administrative documentation such as cost agreements, invoices, and internal forms.

Support internal coordination across multiple stakeholders (e.g., office manager/lead tea
mber + principal).

Maintain organised digital filing and consistent naming conventions (within Migration Manager and associated storage).

Support process documentation (basic SOPs/checklists) as the practice refines workflows.

Assist in visa expiry dates management.



Light Marketing & Business Social Media Support (Secondary / Fill-in Work) (Note: This is not a marketing specialist role; guidance will be provided.)



Assist with basic social media marketing administration, such as:

Drafting or formatting content (as directed)

Scheduling/organising posts or updates (if required)

Maintaining a simple content list/calendar and compiling assets

ing potential candidates and companies with a focus on meeting skill shortages and linking candidates to these companies – guidance and material to be provided

Assist with blog creation for our website under our guidance

Coordinate with internal support (strategy may be provided) and execute tasks consistently.



Systems & Tools



Migration Manager (required)

Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel)

Remote access tools (e.g., Splashtop or equivalent as used by the practice)

Document management/cloud storage as required

Optional tools for documentation: Loom (or similar) for process capture



Skills & Experience



Essential



Proven experience working in an Australian migration environment (migration agency, immigration practice, or closely related). Minimum 2 years of experience.

Strong working knowledge of Migration Manager (must be able to manage cases confidently).

Excellent written and verbal English communication.

High attention to detail with the ability to produce accurate, professional documents.

Strong time management and ability to work with deadlines.

Proactive communicator—able to flag issues early and follow up confidently when input is needed.

Mature and independent worker showing confidence in working proactively in a close team.



Desirable



Prior paralegal experience in migration or administrative law.

Experience preparing employer-sponsored visa documentation (e.g., 482/186 pathways) or similar case types.

Basic marketing coordination exposure (social content admin, light coordination).

Marketing interest.



Key Success Factors (How Performance is Measured)



Accuracy and consistency in Migration Manager case handling

Ability to meet deadlines and manage priorities across multiple matters

Proactive communication and issue escalation (no surprises)

Quality of document preparation and evidence organisation

Reliability, responsiveness, and professionalism in a remote setup

title: Customer Manager – Google & Meta Ads Agency (Fiverr-Based)
description:
**$5/hour | Full-Time | Monday–Friday, 9AM–5PM UK Time**



---



?? **IMPORTANT: Start your application with the word "Lighthouse" so we know you've read the full post. Applications without this will not be considered.**



---



## About Us



We're a small, close-knit team running a Google and Meta Ads agency on Fiverr. We help businesses grow through paid advertising, and we're looking for a Customer Manager to be the key link between our team and our customers and clients.



This isn't a "sit and wait for instructions" role. We need someone who takes ownership, thinks on their feet, and genuinely cares about delivering a great customer experience. There's real room to grow here, both in responsibility and pay, as we continue to scale.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



**Customer Communication & Delivery**

- Be the main point of contact for customers from order start to delivery

- Collect access to client accounts (Google Ads, Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, Meta Ads, websites, etc.)

- Keep clients updated on their order progress

- Handle questions, concerns, and follow-ups with professionalism and warmth



**Operations & Admin**

- Manage internal tickets related to customer orders

- Keep Google Drive documents organised and up to date

- Update and maintain SOPs and knowledge base documents

- Other admin tasks as needed to keep things running smoothly



---



## Must-Have Requirements



- **Native-level English** — both written and verbal.

- **Highly organised** — you can juggle multiple customers and tasks without letting things slip

- **Proactive and independent** — you don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs doing and you do it

- **Thinks beyond SOPs** — you follow processes, but you also know when to use common sense and adapt



---



## Nice to Have



- Basic knowledge of Google Ads (you've created at least a search campaign)

- Basic knowledge of Google Analytics (you've created at least a report)

- Basic understanding of Google Tag Manager and what it does



---



## Ideal Candidate = higher hourly rate



You tick all the must-have boxes AND you've built most or all Google Ads campaign types, and you've set up conversion tracking using Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager. If that's you, we definitely want to hear from you.



---



## Main Tools We Use



Fiverr, Slack, Gmail, Zoom, Notion, Google Docs



---



## How to Apply



1. **Start your application with the word "Lighthouse"**

2. Tell us briefly why you're a great fit for this role

3. **Record a 30-second video** (upload to Loom or Google Drive and paste the link) where you:

   - Tell us your name

   - Describe a time you dealt with a difficult or confused customer and how you handled it

   - Tell us why you're interested in working with a digital advertising company



Applications without the keyword and video will not be reviewed.



We're excited to find the right person for this. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Sales and customer support
description:
Job Description



BDM Assistant / Sales Growth Support (Base + Commission)



Company: So Money Pty Ltd

Work Type: Remote (Philippines)

Contract Type: Independent Contractor

Compensation: Base Pay + Commission (Uncapped Growth Potential)



About So Money



So Money is a solution-based mortgage manager working with mortgage brokers across Australia.



We specialise in non-bank lending solutions, including:



• Self-employed home loans

• Expat and foreign resident mortgages

• Flexible lending solutions for complex scenarios



Our strong backend processing, fast turnaround times, and product expertise allow brokers to focus on growing their business while we support them with solutions and operational efficiency.



As our partner network continues to grow, we are expanding our BDM support team to help strengthen broker relationships and drive business growth.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly motivated BDM Assistant / Sales Support professional who enjoys working in a sales-driven environment and supporting business growth.



You will work closely with our Business Development Manager (BDM) to support and grow relationships with mortgage broker partners across Australia.



Your role is to help engage brokers, support deal opportunities, and assist partners in growing their submissions with So Money.



This role offers stable base pay with performance-based commissions, giving strong performers the opportunity to increase their earnings as partner business grows.



Key Responsibilities

Broker Relationship Management



Support the BDM team in managing relationships with mortgage broker partners



Maintain regular contact with partners to ensure engagement and support



Build strong relationships with brokers and understand their lending needs



Ensure partners are aware of So Money’s products, updates, and opportunities



Sales & Growth Support



Follow up with brokers regarding loan opportunities and deal progress



Encourage broker submissions by providing responsive support



Assist with basic product enquiries and information



Identify opportunities to increase partner loan activity



Work closely with the BDM to support overall sales growth



Partner Engagement & Performance



Monitor broker activity and submission trends



Follow up with inactive partners and help re-engage them



Support the BDM with partner performance tracking



Maintain accurate CRM records and communication history



Compensation



This role offers Base Pay + Commission.



Your commission opportunities are linked to:



• Partner engagement and activity

• Loan submissions generated from supported brokers

• Settled loan outcomes



High performers can significantly increase earnings as broker business grows.



Why This Role Is Attractive



? Base income plus commission incentives

? Work directly with an experienced BDM team

? Exposure to the Australian mortgage industry

? Opportunity to grow into a BDM or sales leadership role

? Long-term remote opportunity with growth potential

? Performance-based income with no strict earning cap



Requirements

Essential



Strong English communication skills



Confident speaking with business professionals



Sales-driven mindset



Highly organised and proactive



Comfortable working in a remote environment



Experience in sales, telesales, account management, or sales support



Preferred



Experience working with Australian clients



Mortgage, finance, or lending industry exposure



BDM support or account management experience



CRM experience



Who This Role Is For



Sales professionals who enjoy building relationships



Individuals who want stable income with strong commission upside



People who enjoy supporting business growth and sales teams



Candidates who want long-term career opportunities in financial services

title: Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator (Remote)
description:
We are a leading pole fitness company with multiple studio locations across Melbourne, Australia. Our mission is to empower people through the art of pole dancing by promoting fitness, confidence, self expression and body positivity.



Alongside our studios, we run a growing online store selling pole dance equipment, apparel and accessories to customers across Australia and internationally.



We also work with a remote team based in the Philippines who play an important role in our operations, marketing and customer experience.



We are now looking for an experienced Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator to help manage and grow our online store.



This role is ideal for someone who understands how to run promotions, manage product launches, grow
 marketing and build an engaged social media presence while keeping the Shopify store organised and performing well.



You will work closely with our marketing and leadership team to execute campaigns, manage the store, coordinate with suppliers and help drive online sales.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify Store Management

Manage and maintain our Shopify store including product listings, product descriptions, pricing, images and collections.

Ensure all product information is accurate and presented in a way that maximises conversions and customer experience.

Organise products, collections and promotions inside Shopify to support marketing campaigns and seasonal offers.



 Marketing & Promotions

Plan and execute
 marketing campaigns using platforms such as Klaviyo or similar tools.

Create promotional campaigns around product launches, seasonal sales and special offers.

Segment audiences and track performance to continually improve open rates, engagement and sales conversions.



Social Media Management

Manage and grow our Instagram presence for the online store.

Plan and schedule posts that promote products, highlight customers and showcase the pole fitness lifestyle.

Coordinate social media promotions, product highlights and campaign launches.



Product & Supplier Coordination

Communicate with suppliers regarding product availability, inventory updates and new product opportunities.

Coordinate product launches including uploading products, preparing marketing assets and supporting promotional campaigns.

Ensure the store is always well stocked and up to date with the latest products.



Performance Tracking

Monitor store performance using Shopify analytics and marketing tools.

Track sales, campaign performance and customer behaviour to identify opportunities to increase conversions.

Provide regular insights and suggestions to improve promotions and marketing strategies.



Requirements

Proven experience managing or working with Shopify stores from a marketing and promotions perspective

Experience running
 marketing campaigns and promotional sales

Strong understanding of Instagram marketing and social media content for e-commerce

Experience uploading and managing products, collections and promotions inside Shopify

Strong written English and clear communication skills

Highly organised with strong attention to detail

Ability to work independently in a remote environment while collaborating with the team

Experience working with suppliers or managing product inventory is highly regarded

Bonus if you have experience with pole fitness, dance, fitness brands or lifestyle brands



Why Join Our Team

You will be working with a passionate and growing brand that is changing lives through pole fitness.

Our team values creativity, independence and people who take initiative.

title: Experienced Cold Caller – Hourly Pay + Sales Bonuses
description:
We’re a US-based roofing company expanding our proven call center operation and looking for experienced cold callers who are confident speaking with US homeowners and motivated by performance pay. If you’re comfortable on the dialer and know how to convert conversations into sales, this role offers consistent hours, clear pay increases, and strong bonus potential.



Compensation starts at $3/hour base pay, with increases based on performance every pay period (2 weeks). Dialers who perform consistently can quickly move into higher hourly tiers while earning additional bonuses for each sale.



Key Compensation Details:

- Base Pay: $3/hour

- 2+ sales in a pay period: $4/hour for that period

- 4+ sales in a pay period: $5/hour for that period

- $25 bonus for every sale



Most dialers should expect to make 2+ sales per week, regularly earning $4/hour + $50+ in bonuses, while strong performers often reach $5/hour + $100+ weekly in bonuses.



This is a full-time role with stable hours.



Schedule:

- 40 hours per week

- Monday – Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

- 1 hour unpaid lunch break

- Optional Saturday hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (not required)



We are specifically looking for candidates who meet the following requirements:



Requirements:



- Excellent English fluency

- Natural American accent

- Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

- Experience with US roofing, solar, or real estate campaigns preferred



Applicants who do not meet these requirements will not be interviewed.



To move forward in the hiring process, please include a 30-second video clip introducing yourself and briefly explaining:

- Your cold calling experience

- Your experience with roofing or insurance claim campaigns

- Which mornings you are available for a 9 AM CST interview



We are conducting interviews every morning at 9:00 AM CST for the next two weeks and are looking for candidates who can start immediately.



If you’re a consistent dialer who can deliver results and wants to work with a company that already has a proven system and real bonus potential, we’d love to hear from you.



— Graham

Roofing Solutions

title: MARKETING LEAD
description:
SENIOR MARKETING LEAD – REMOTE FULL-TIME ROLE (UK-Based B2B Tech Company)



Position: Senior Marketing Lead

Salary: Competitive and negotiable based on experience

Contract: Full-time, long-term (40 hours weekly), fully remote

Work Hours: 4 PM – 1 AM Manila Time, Monday to Friday (Weekends Off)



APPLY HERE: 



Applications are accepted via our Google Form only. The most important part of your application is your 90-second video introduction. The form also includes questions to assess your skills and fit.



Applications without a video will not be considered.





OVERVIEW



We are a small, specialist B2B technology company based in the UK and a certified Google Cloud partner. We sell software products and professional services to businesses and schools, mainly in the UK and US.



You will be our only dedicated marketer. There is a small team around you who can help with execution, but *you are the person who makes sure things get done*. You will plan, brief, create, and report — week in, week out. You will work directly with the CEO and be trusted to run marketing independently within agreed goals.



This is a long-term role ideally suited to someone aged 30–42 who has real B2B marketing experience behind them, enjoys variety, takes ownership naturally, and thrives when no two weeks look the same.





WHAT YOU WILL OWN



1. Content and SEO — minimum 2 blog posts per week across two B2B websites. You do not have to write every post but you must make sure every post gets written, edited, and published on time.



2. AI Engine Optimisation (AEO) — we need to appear when business buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews about the problems we solve. You will structure content to make that happen and run monthly visibility checks.



3. YouTube channel and video — we are moving our website to a video-first format and this is a core part of the role. Our technical team records product demos. You brief them, manage the edit and publish process, run the YouTube channel, and lead the rollout of video across our web pages. You will also produce or direct short clips for LinkedIn and site embeds (around 4–8 per month to start).



4. Competitor monitoring — set up alerts, keep our comparison pages current, and update them quickly when competitors change pricing or positioning.



5.
 newsletter and LinkedIn — your channels to grow and maintain consistently.



6. Google Workspace partner community — other GWS partners and resellers should know who we are. Being visible in the right communities is a genuine competitive advantage and something we expect you to own.



7. Sales collateral — one-pagers and battlecards per product line. Write them or project manage them through the team.



8. Weekly update to the CEO and monthly KPI review.





KEY REQUIREMENTS



1. MINIMUM 5 years of hands-on marketing experiencei — this is a hard requirement, please do not apply if you do not meet it

2. Strong writer — clear, punchy, outcome-focused, no corporate fluff

3. Natural project manager who gets things done through people as well as themselves

4. Highly organised with a proven system for managing multiple workstreams at once

5. Daily user of AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity etc.) — be ready to talk about this specifically

6. Solid SEO knowledge and genuine interest in AI search and AEO

7. Strong hands-on experience creating and producing marketing videos — this is essential. 

8. Experience managing or directing a YouTube channel and video distribution

9. Deep working knowledge of Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Sites etc.) — we are a Google Cloud partner and you must be able to speak about GWS products credibly and confidently

10. Commercially minded — you track leads and pipeline, not just traffic and likes

11. Excellent written and spoken English

12. Professional home office setup for video calls





DESIRABLE



1. Experience marketing to US US enterprise buyers

2. Active presence in Google Workspace or Google Cloud partner communities

3. GA4 certified or strong hands-on Google Analytics experience





THE RIGHT FIT FOR OUR TEAM



1. Aged 30–42 with solid hands-on marketing experience — not at the start of your career

2. Seeking a long-term career, not a short-term gig

3. Self-motivated and productive when working independently

4. Comfortable reporting directly to a CEO and being trusted to get on with it

5. Energised by variety — strategy one day, writing the next, briefing a developer the day after

6. Honest, direct, and solutions-focused





WHAT WE OFFER



1. Long-term role with a stable, growing company

2. Direct collaboration with the CEO from day one

3. Genuine ownership — this is your marketing function to build and run

4. Competitive salary with annual review

5. Fully remote with weekends off

6. A role where your work is visible and your impact is measurable





TECHNICAL SETUP REQUIREMENTS



1. Computer: Minimum Intel i5 or Ryzen 5 (or equivalent), 8GB RAM, SSD storage

2. Internet: Minimum 30 Mbps stable connection with a backup option

3. Equipment: USB headset with noise cancellation, HD webcam, professional home office setup





HOW TO APPLY



Submit your application here: 



Your application must include:

1. A 90-second personal introduction video (landscape, professional appearance, clear English)

2. Why this role fits where you are right now

3. Two or three examples of B2B marketing work you are proud of (links are fine)

4. How you use AI tools in your marketing work today — be specific



We will respond to every application. We will not ghost you.



APPLY HERE:

title: TikTok Community Manager (US Market)
description:
We are looking for a TikTok-focused Community Manager to lead the growth and management of our accounts targeting the United States market.

Our products are books targeted at young couples, and this is a mid-to-long-term collaboration with real growth potential.



!!! Please read carefully what we need, before sending a message:



1) Requirements



· You must have a dedicated mobile phone (iPhone or Android) that will be used exclusively to manage and upload content for the U.S. market.

· The device must be configured from scratch for the U.S. audience. We will provide a step-by-step guide to set this up. The process is simple, but it requires a device that is separate from your personal phone.

· You must also use a VPN with a Dedicated IP (static IP) so TikTok consistently detects the device as located in the United States. It is a big plus if you already have a dedicated VPN available.



2) What We Are Looking For

We are looking for a strategic thinker with proven experience in organic TikTok growth. The ideal candidate is organized and comfortable creating TikTok content



3) Position Objective

Develop, manage, and scale TikTok accounts focused on the U.S. market, with the goal of creating viral videos that drive organic traffic to 
 and increase book sales.



Main Responsibilities:



1. Creation and Management of TikTok Accounts (USA)



• Create and manage TikTok accounts targeting the U.S. market

• Create content and publish posts daily

• TikTok will be the primary platform: Instagram or
 may be used as secondary distribution channels



2. Strategic Content Publishing & Management



• Publish content following the creative guidelines we provide

• Adapt content to TikTok USA trends and algorithm changes

• Schedule and manage posts using Metricool (or similar tools)

• Analyze performance metrics (retention, engagement, conversion)

• Propose improvements based on performance data



3. Content Creation



• Publish both image-based and video content

During the first weeks, we will provide most of the content. Once the physical books arrive at your home, you will create your own images and videos, not only for the accounts you manage but also for content production for our brand.



4. Affiliate & Creator Outreach (TikTok Shop)



• Identify U.S.-based micro-creators and affiliates

• Reach out and manage collaborations

• Manage UGC campaigns

• Build and maintain a creator database

• Analyze the ideal customer avatar

• Ensure affiliates properly tag our products in TikTok Shop

 

4) Ideal Profile



• Proven experience growing TikTok accounts, especially in the U.S. market

• Strategic mindset and results-driven approach

• Ability to work independently

• Familiarity with tools such as Metricool or similar social media management platforms

• Strong communication and reporting skills.



During the first week, screenshots will be required to confirm that the content is being shown in the U.S. market (which should happen naturally when using a dedicated device configured for the U.S.).

To confirm you have read the job description carefully, please include the word “book” in your proposal.



 

5) Work Volume



• Initially managing 3 TikTok accounts (one per book)

• Posting 3 posts per account per day (9 posts per day total): This is manageable thanks to the mix of images and short video formats we use.



We are a growing brand, so this is intended to be a long-term collaboration, not a short-term project. This is important for both sides.

 

6) Compensation



• $300 per month

• 22 hours per week

• Performance-based bonuses tied to growth and results

 

!IMPORTANT! Please include in your proposal



• Your experience managing TikTok accounts targeting the U.S. market

• Examples of results achieved (if possible)

• Confirmation that you have a dedicated phone for managing the U.S. account

title: Accounts & Admin Support (Full Time Australian Founder)

APPLY HERE:

We’re an Australian-led group operating creative, digital, and e-commerce brands.

We’re building a culture of clarity, excellence, and high performance — and we’re looking for a detail-driven Accounts & Admin Coordinator who can support finance operations, recruitment, and general business administration.



This role suits someone organised, proactive, and comfortable handling a mix of accounts admin, hiring coordination, and operational tasks.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a hybrid support role combining bookkeeping assistance, recruitment coordination, and general administrative work across multiple businesses.



You’ll work closely with leadership to keep operations running smoothly — ensuring financial records stay organised, recruitment pipelines move forward, and day-to-day admin tasks are handled efficiently.



The role is remote, but applicants must live within one hour of Manila or Quezon City in case occasional in-person collaboration is required.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Accounts & Finance Admin

Upload and process bills/receipts using Dext

Categorise and reconcile transactions in Xero

Assist with reconciliation of platforms such as:

PayPal

Stripe

Shopify

Wise



Bank accounts

Apply correct GST treatment for Australian and international suppliers

Track subscriptions, reimbursements, and recurring expenses

Maintain organised financial folders and documentation

Prepare simple weekly financial summaries or reports

Flag discrepancies or missing records

Post job listings across recruitment platforms

Screen candidates and shortlist based on criteria

Schedule interviews with leadership

Coordinate hiring pipelines and candidate communications

Maintain organised hiring records and notes

Assist with onboarding documentation for new hires



General Administration

Maintain organised digital folders and documentation

Assist with research, operational tasks, and internal projects

Coordinate simple reporting or summaries

Support leadership with ad-hoc operational requests

Use AI tools to assist with research, summaries, or documentation where helpful



REQUIRED SKILLS

2+ years experience in admin, bookkeeping, recruitment coordination, or operations support

Experience with Xero or similar accounting software

Experience with Dext

Excellent written and spoken English

Strong organisation and attention to detail

Comfortable managing multiple tasks across finance and operations

Ability to work independently and solve problems proactively

Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup



NICE TO HAVE

Experience supporting Australian businesses

Experience with Shopify, Stripe, PayPal bookkeeping

Recruitment coordination or HR administration experience

Intermediate Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with Wise, Airwallex, or multi-currency payments

Comfortable using AI tools to improve efficiency



PAY, HOURS & BENEFITS

Full time role

Flexible schedule with some AEST overlap

40,000 - 60,000 PHP

Paid fortnightly via Wise

Long-term role with opportunity to expand hours



Culture & Perks

Remote-first, outcome-driven environment

Clear systems and strong communication

Professional, respectful team culture

Opportunity to grow with the business



LOCATION REQUIREMENT

Applicants must be based within one hour of Manila or Quezon City.

Someone who has good decision making skills and has good analysis on situations and can manage whatever challenges arise. 

Proactive and very reliable

Can work in US Time Zone - EST

Honest and Trustworthy especially with system credentials

Someone who wants long term job stability 



Please make sure to send us your resume attached or CV Links for proper evaluation.  We will not reply to anyone who applies without sending their CVs.



Offer $1,200- $1,600 per month based on experience



Thank you!

title: Client Success Assistant / Client Success Agent (Remote)
description:
Company: Baton (
/)

Work Hours: 9:00 AM-6:00 PM (Mountain Standard Time)

Location: Remote / Work from Home



Are you detail-oriented, highly professional, and passionate about helping clients succeed?

If you enjoy communication, analyzing data, and making things run smoothly, we’d love to hear from you!



About the Role:

At Baton, we're looking for a Client Success Assistant / Client Success Agent who will play a key role in making sure our clients stay satisfied and successful.

You will be the primary point of contact for client inquiries, manage critical data analysis, and coordinate communication across internal teams to ensure every client need is handled with speed, care, and precision. You'll also provide important background support to our Client Success department.



What You'll Do:

- Serve as the first point of contact for client inquiries via
, chat, and occasional phone communication.

- Manage and track client issues, questions, and requests to ensure they are resolved quickly and accurately.

- Act as a liaison between clients, Account Managers, and other departments, ensuring aligned and efficient communication.

- Facilitate and document partner and client updates across multiple teams, ensuring consistent and professional follow-through.

- Conduct critical analysis of client data and reporting metrics to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement.

- Support Client Success Managers with administrative and operational tasks, including CRM updates, background research, and reporting.

- Proactively follow up with clients to check satisfaction and uncover additional support needs.

- Collaborate with internal teams to deliver high-quality, timely service.



What We're Looking For:

- Exceptional English communication skills (both written and verbal).

- Professional and neutral English accent.

- Strong English comprehension — you process information quickly and respond thoughtfully.

- Previous experience in client success, customer support, or account management (preferred).

- Strong skills in data analysis — able to interpret numbers, recognize patterns, and make actionable recommendations.

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to prioritize multiple tasks effectively.

- Experience coordinating communication across teams or departments (preferred).

- Proficiency with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred) and communication tools like Intercom, Slack, Zoom.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision and collaborate remotely with a team.

- High attention to detail and commitment to maintaining accuracy.

- Positive, empathetic, and solution-oriented when working with clients.

- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience (preferred).



What We Offer:

- Starting pay of $5.75 USD per hour during the 30-day training period.

- Upon successful training completion and extension of a permanent contract, pay increases to $6.00 USD per hour.

- Eligibility for quarterly performance bonuses tied to role success.

- Annual raises based on performance and tenure.

- A supportive, collaborative team environment where your contributions matter.

- Career growth opportunities in a fast-paced, expanding company.

- Ongoing training and professional development to sharpen your skills.

- Remote work flexibility — work from anywhere!



How to Apply :

To apply, please send an
 to 
 with the following:

1. Subject line: "Client Success Assistant / Client Success Agent - Full Name "

2. Attach your resume.

3. Include a LOOM recording (max 90 seconds) of yourself:

a. First half: Briefly discuss your experience.

b. Second half: Share a bit about yourself and your interests. (Please use LOOM; no

attachments.)



***Please do not use the website interest form to apply. To be considered, you must follow the application instructions listed in this job post. Submissions through the website will not be reviewed.***
