title: Loan Officer
description:
Role Overview



As a Loan Officer at So Money, you will be responsible for managing loan applications from submission through to settlement.

This role focuses on loan processing, lender liaison, and settlement coordination, requiring strong attention to detail, a solid understanding of lending processes, and the ability to manage multiple files efficiently.



Key Responsibilities

Loan Processing & Application Management



Liaise with mortgage brokers and internal teams to collect, review, and verify loan application documents



Conduct preliminary assessments of client financial information (income, liabilities, credit history, etc.)



Assist in structuring appropriate loan solutions (Owner Occupied, Investment, Alt Doc, LVR considerations)



Prepare and submit loan applications to lenders



Monitor application progress, including valuations, conditional approvals, and credit requirements



Settlement Coordination



Coordinate settlements with lenders, solicitors, conveyancers, and internal settlement teams



Review loan contracts, mortgage documents, and settlement statements prior to settlement



Follow up outstanding conditions and documentation to ensure timely settlement



Manage post-approval and pre-settlement requirements to avoid delays



Documentation & Compliance



Ensure all loan files comply with NCCP, AML/CTF, and internal compliance requirements



Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in CRM and loan systems



Ensure documentation is complete, accurate, and audit-ready



Key Requirements

Essential



Minimum 1 year experience in the Australian mortgage industry (Loan Officer, Loan Processor, Settlement Officer, or Broker Support role)



Good understanding of the end-to-end home loan process, including settlement



Strong attention to detail and organisational skills



Ability to manage multiple applications in a fast-paced environment



Strong written and verbal communication skills



Desirable



Certificate IV in Finance and Mortgage Broking (completed or in progress)



Experience with non-bank lending, Alt Doc loans, or complex income scenarios



Familiarity with ApplyOnline, Mercury, Salestrekker, or similar platforms



Experience working with mortgage brokers, lenders, solicitors, or conveyancers

title: Collections & Customer Operations Agent
description:
If you enjoy resolving payment issues, guiding customers through repayment options, and have experience in fintech or Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, then this role is for you. Apply here: 

About us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset.

What You’ll Do

As a Customer Operations & Collections Agent, you’ll be the trusted point of contact for our customers - helping them manage their payments, resolve account issues, and stay on track with repayments. You’ll handle everything from contacting customers to settle accounts, guiding them through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery efforts.

IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Team Lead/Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Bi-weekly salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holiday, listed here

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech





Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 6pm - 1am PH, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Leverage AI-driven tools to streamline workflows, optimize response times, and enhance the quality of support delivered.

* Drive continuous improvement by gathering and sharing actionable customer insights with product and internal teams to enhance offerings and processes.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or * lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started:

title: Freelance Property Brochure Designer
description:
Luxury Property Marketing | Project Based Role



We are a premium UK property brand looking for a highly skilled freelance designer to produce beautifully designed property brochures.



This is a project based role, not a full time position. Each time we launch a new property we will require a brochure to be designed using our existing design style and layout system.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands luxury presentation, typography, and print design, and who can consistently deliver work at a very high visual standard.



About The Ivybridge Collection



The Ivybridge Collection is a premium estate agency specialising in exceptional homes across Norfolk and Suffolk.



Our marketing focuses on cinematic presentation, high quality photography and magazine quality brochures. Our printed brochures are an important part of how we present properties to buyers.



We already have established brochure styles. Your role will be to take these existing designs and adapt them for new properties.



Role Overview



For each property we market you will receive:



• Property description text

• Professional photography

• Floorplans and property details



Your task will be to design a high quality property brochure using these materials while maintaining our established design style.



Attention to detail, layout balance and typography are extremely important.



Design Quality Expectations



Our brochures should feel closer to a high end lifestyle magazine than a basic property leaflet.



Important characteristics include:



• Elegant typography

• Clean, spacious layouts

• Careful image placement

• Consistent branding

• Strong visual hierarchy



We are looking for designers who understand luxury presentation and premium print design.



Required Software Skills



You must be comfortable using professional design software such as:



Adobe InDesign

(preferred for brochure design)



Adobe Photoshop



Adobe Illustrator



Responsibilities



You will:



• Design property brochures based on our existing style

• Arrange images, text and floorplans in a clean layout

• Maintain consistent branding across all brochures

• Ensure all typography and spacing is precise and professional

• Prepare final files for high quality printing



Required Outputs



Each completed brochure must include:



• High resolution print ready PDF

• Correct bleed and crop marks

• CMYK colour profile suitable for professional printing

• High resolution images correctly placed and scaled



In some cases we may also request:



• A web friendly PDF version for online viewing



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Has strong experience designing brochures or magazines

• Understands luxury branding and layout design

• Has excellent attention to detail

• Communicates clearly and reliably

• Can work efficiently when new properties launch



Experience in property marketing, luxury brands or editorial design would be highly beneficial.



How This Role Works



This is a freelance gig role.



When a new property launches we will send the materials and brief, and you will design the brochure for that property.



Typically each brochure is between 12 and 24 pages depending on the property.



We expect turnaround times of approximately 2 to 5 days depending on complexity.



To Apply



Please include:



• Examples of brochure or magazine design work

• Examples of print ready design projects

• The software you use for layout design



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



Important



Please begin your application with the words:



Luxury presentation matters



This helps us filter automated responses.

title: AI Automation & Agent Systems Engineer (n8n / LLM / AI Workflows)
description:
**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Full-Time or Contract (Initial 3–4 week build project, long-term role available)



---



### About Us



We are a fast-growing B2B lead generation company that helps businesses generate qualified clients through:



* LinkedIn outreach

*
 campaigns

* paid advertising

* CRM automation



Our company already runs a large number of automation workflows using tools like n8n and other integrations.



We are now building the next stage of our infrastructure: an **AI-powered operations layer** that will automate large parts of our fulfilment, outreach, reporting and internal operations.



This role is to **design and build that system.**



---



### The Role



We are looking for an **AI Automation & Agent Systems Engineer** who can design and build a system of AI agents and automation workflows that integrate into our existing operations.



The goal is to create an AI-powered operating layer that can:



* monitor campaigns

* analyse performance data

* generate reports

* assist with outreach replies

* generate creative assets

* assist sales operations

* coordinate workflows internally



We already have many automation workflows in place, but we need someone who can **build the AI layer on top of them.**



You will work directly with the founder and our internal automation engineer to implement this.



---



### Key Responsibilities



Design and build AI-powered workflows for our business operations.



This includes:



**AI Agents & Automation**



* Build AI agents that perform operational tasks within our business

* Create multi-step workflows combining automation tools and LLMs

* Design systems where agents can analyse data and trigger actions

* Integrate AI tools with our existing automations



**Workflow Automation**



* Build workflows using n8n

* Connect APIs, webhooks and databases

* Trigger automated actions across systems

* Create reliable, error-handled automations



**AI Integrations**



* Integrate LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI, etc.)

* Build prompt structures for business workflows

* Implement AI classification and decision-making logic

* Create AI-generated outputs (reports, messages, insights)



**Business Systems Integration**



Connect our automation layer with tools such as:



* CRM systems

* Slack

*
 systems

* outreach tools

* marketing platforms

* internal dashboards



**AI Reporting & Analysis**



Build systems that automatically:



* analyse campaign results

* generate weekly reports

* identify underperforming campaigns

* suggest improvements



**Agent Safety & Control**



Implement safeguards such as:



* approval steps for sensitive actions

* restricted tool access

* logging and monitoring



---



### Tools & Technologies (Experience Required)



You must have experience with most of the following:



**Automation**



* n8n

* Zapier / Make

* Webhooks

* API integrations



**AI / LLM**



* OpenAI API

* Claude API

* Prompt engineering

* LLM workflows



**Backend / Technical**



* REST APIs

* JSON workflows

* databases (Postgres / Supabase)

* workflow logic and automation design



**Nice to Have**



* LangGraph

* CrewAI

* vector databases

* Docker

* server deployments

* AI agent frameworks



---



### What You Will Build



The system will include automation such as:



* AI campaign performance analysis

* automated weekly client reporting

* outreach inbox analysis and lead detection

* AI-generated ad creatives and scripts

* campaign monitoring alerts

* sales pipeline insights

* internal task coordination



Many of the workflows already exist in parts. Your role is to **connect them into a coherent AI-driven system.**



---



### Requirements



You must:



* Have **real experience building automation systems**

* Understand **how to integrate AI into business workflows**

* Be comfortable working with APIs and automation platforms

* Be able to design systems, not just follow instructions

* Be able to work quickly and independently

* Communicate clearly and provide regular progress updates



We are looking for someone who can **own this build**, not someone who only executes small tasks.



---



### Timeline



Initial build timeline:



Week 1

Architecture design and first AI workflows built



Week 2

Integration with existing automation systems



Week 3

Deployment, testing and optimisation



There may be an opportunity for a **long-term role maintaining and improving the system.**



---



### Compensation



Competitive depending on experience.



We are open to:



* contract project

* full-time hire

* long-term collaboration



---



### How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. Examples of AI automation systems you have built

2. Tools you have used (n8n, OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

3. A short explanation of how you would design an AI workflow that analyses campaign results and generates a report

4. Your availability for the next 3–4 weeks



Applications without examples will not be considered.



 YOUR APP TO

title: PHONE EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (Sales Focused) [REMOTE]
description:
YOU (THE CANDIDATE):

You are the kind of woman who treats your work like it's your business. You thrive in a role where communication, intelligence, and quick thinking matter every single day. You excel at verbal communication in English, think quickly under pressure (including in an interview), and you have a natural sales mentality — you feel confident encouraging tenants to sign or renew a lease without needing scripts or hand-holding, even if you are new to property management. You are thrilled by the idea of a lifetime job opportunity instead of applying for 100 new jobs every 6 months. 



Read these carefully - if this sounds like you, you’re who we want:



• You love speaking with people - idea of encouraging tenants to renew their lease or confidently talking with new applicants about why they should choose our homes actually energizes you.

• You’re calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - when you receive calls about issues, your natural instinct is to resolve, not get flustered.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - the kind that U.S.-based callers can easily understand on the phone.

• You are resourceful and skilled at problem solving, able to think on your feet, and naturally good at handling unexpected or challenging situations.

• You consider yourself highly intelligent - the type of person others rely on when something tricky needs solving.

• You have prior work-from-home experience and know how to manage yourself independently.

• You have a proven history of staying with past employers (ideally 2 years or more).

• You want stable, long-term, full-time employment and value security over chasing short-term high pay that disappears.

If this is you authentically - not aspirationally - we want to meet you (even if you haven’t worked in Property Management before).

_____________________________



US (THE COMPANY):

• We are a U.S. based long-term rental property company - not Airbnb, not short-term rentals.

• We currently manage 100+ houses and are growing quickly.

• We expect to reach another 100–200 homes in the next two years.

• We value ladies who want long-term stability with us - 10 years, not 10 months.

_____________________________



COMMITMENT FROM YOU:

 • Full-time (40 hours/week)

 • Availability: Monday–Friday, 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time | Active working hours occur within that window

 • This is a long-term, secure role for someone who wants to grow with us at $700-$1000 Monthly (Based on Experience) + Bonuses

_____________________________



Apply Here: 

OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 40,000 - Php 65,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: HighLevel (GHL) Technical Support & Reporting VA
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term | Growth Role | Remote



We are a fast-growing UK fitness franchise using GoHighLevel to run lead management, booking, messaging, and automations across 25+ locations.



We are looking for a technically strong Virtual Assistant who can own our GoHighLevel systems and reporting and support franchisees day to day.



This is not a generic VA role. You will be working inside live production systems that affect lead flow, bookings, and revenue across a real franchise network.



At Transform Hub, we care about people, and that extends to the people who work for us.



This is a chance to work alongside the Head of Tech and the CEO of a booming fitness franchise. You will learn about and get a chance to use emerging technology and use GHL for far more than a standard business or marketing agency.





Core Outcome



You are responsible for keeping our GoHighLevel systems and Google Sheets reporting accurate, live, and trusted across the entire franchise network.



If a franchisee or leader asks, “What’s happening with my leads and sales this week?”, we should be able to answer using dashboards and reports that you maintain.



This Is Not a Junior Role



We are not looking for someone who is still learning GoHighLevel.



You must already have hands-on experience managing live GoHighLevel accounts, diagnosing problems independently, and working in systems where mistakes affect real businesses.



Do not apply if:



- You have not used GoHighLevel in a live production environment

- You cannot work UK hours (9am–5pm GMT/BST), Monday to Friday

- You rely on snapshot cloning without understanding how the systems actually work

- You are uncomfortable troubleshooting problems you have not seen before



Hours & Setup



- Full-time: 40 hours per week



- UK hours: 9am–5pm GMT/BST, Monday to Friday



- Not an async role - you’ll work live alongside the UK team



- Daily 10-minute Zoom check-in



- Ongoing communication via Slack



What You Will Be Doing



Priority 0 – Reporting & Data Hygiene (Daily / Weekly)



This is the foundation of the role. You keep our numbers clean so decisions are based on reality, not guesses.



Examples:



Check that all key metrics are flowing correctly from GoHighLevel into Google Sheets / dashboards (leads, booked calls, show-ups, sales, cancels, churn).



Manually update or correct data when automations miss something (fixing stages, tags, sources, owners, etc.).



Run daily and weekly “sanity checks” to spot problems early (e.g. a site suddenly shows 0 leads today, pipeline totals look wrong, a formula is broken).



Maintain clear, documented definitions for every KPI so reporting is consistent across all locations.



Prepare simple weekly summary reports for leadership and franchisees.

Work with tools like 
 (we can train you) to keep reporting flows reliable.



Priority 1 – Franchisee Support & Troubleshooting (Daily)



You are the first point of contact when something breaks or looks wrong.



Real examples:

A franchisee reports that automated follow-up messages have stopped sending.

The AI booking bot is not adding appointments to the correct calendar.

Leads are receiving duplicate or overlapping automated messages even after staff have replied.

Booking confirmations are going out with the wrong location or coach name.

A workflow that was working last week has silently broken.



You will:



Check workflow execution logs and trigger conditions.

Reproduce the problem in a controlled way.

Find the root cause, not just describe the symptom.

Test your fix safely before pushing it live.



Priority 2 – Workflow & Automation Management (Regular)



Create and edit workflows and automations.

Manage pipelines, stages, and opportunity flows.

Build and maintain forms, surveys, calendars, and basic landing pages.

Set up and edit SMS,
, and WhatsApp templates.

Manage contacts and bulk actions carefully (no “oops, I messaged 10,000 people by mistake”).



Priority 3 – Account Setup & Systems (As Needed)



Set up new franchise sub-accounts from snapshots.

Manage snapshots and sub-account configurations.

Handle basic webhook setup inside GoHighLevel.

Liaise with GoHighLevel support when needed and follow through to resolution.



Tools You Will Use



GoHighLevel (core of the role – required)

Google Sheets (daily for reporting and checks)

Slack (team communication)

Canva (basic asset tweaks)

GHL calendars and booking systems

AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT) to speed up your work without reducing quality

Bonus: 
 and CloseBot experience



The Type of Person We Want



This matters more than your tool list.



Green Flags



- You check workflow execution history before asking what went wrong.

- You test a fix in a controlled way before pushing it live.

- You proactively flag issues you spot before anyone reports them.

- You explain why something broke, not just what you changed.

- You are comfortable saying, “I need to check this before I change anything.”

- You notice when numbers don’t look right in a report and go dig.



Red Flags



- You guess or change settings without understanding the impact.

- You say “done” without testing.

- You need to be told what to look at every time something breaks.

- You avoid taking ownership when something goes wrong.

- You are not available during UK working hours.



Experience Required



Proven experience using GoHighLevel in a live, production environment.

Experience supporting multiple accounts or locations is strongly preferred.

Strong Google Sheets skills (lookups, filters, pivots, error checking).

Comfortable learning new tools and adapting to evolving systems.

Detail-oriented, reliable, and calm when things break.

Strong written English – you will communicate directly with franchisees (business owners, not tech people).



Compensation



$1,200–$1,500 USD per month, depending on experience

Performance-based increases

Long-term role with room to grow for the right person



Hiring Process & How To Apply



Written Application

In your application, please include:





- A short summary of your GoHighLevel experience (what you actually did, not just “used it”).

- A link to a Google Sheet dashboard or report you have built or maintained. Briefly explain how you kept the data accurate (3–5 sentences).

- A short description of a time when the numbers in a report didn’t make sense. How did you find the root cause and fix it?

- Short Loom Video (2–3 minutes)





Introduce yourself.



Walk through the Google Sheet/report you shared and explain how you use it.



Tell us about the most complex GoHighLevel problem you have fixed.



We will then proceed to a 1-on-1 Interview with shortlisted candidates.





Afterwards, we will make a final decision.





If you want a fun role where your technical brain, attention to detail, and calm problem-solving directly impact dozens of real businesses every day, we’d like to see your application.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Operations Manager — SEO Agency

Reviewly Pty Ltd  |  Full-Time  |  Remote (Philippines)  |  Long-Term Role

 ?  Permanent role  |  ?  Australian SEO agency  |  ?  $1,500–$1,700 USD/month  |  ?  Build something that lasts



Role at a Glance



Position Operations Manager



Company Reviewly Pty Ltd — Australian SEO agency (
)



Reports to CEO — Tanya Somerton



Hours Full-time, 40 hours/week — Australian business hours (AEST)



Location 100% remote — work from home in the Philippines



Salary $1,500–$1,700 USD per month based on SEO experience and agency background



Role type Permanent long-term position — we are not looking for short-term contractors



SEO experience REQUIRED — minimum 2–3 years inside an SEO agency environment



Taskade REQUIRED — you will build, structure, and enforce our Taskade system from day one



English & client comms REQUIRED — you will write directly to clients and having Zooms on behalf of the business. Your English must be professional, clear and natural, not templated or translated-sounding



??  This is a client-facing, quality-gatekeeper, and systems-builder role, not a virtual assistant position. You will write directly to Australian business clients on behalf of Reviewly. Your written English must be professional, natural, and confident. You must also have real SEO agency experience AND the ability to build and enforce project management systems. If you do not have all three, please do not apply.



About Reviewly

Reviewly is an Australian SEO agency helping local businesses grow online through Local SEO, Google Business Profile management, Technical SEO, content strategy, and our proprietary Satellite Search system that creates additional search presence for clients across targeted locations.



We are a small, focused team operating across multiple active client accounts. We use Taskade as our central task management platform and Google Drive for all client and internal file management. We are actively building out our internal systems, automation workflows, and AI tools and we want someone who sees that as an exciting opportunity, not a complication.



We are a legitimate, stable Australian business. We pay on time, we communicate clearly, and we are committed to building a long-term remote team. If you are looking for a role where you can genuinely contribute to how a business operates and grows, this is it.



The Role

The Operations Manager is the operational backbone of Reviewly's client delivery. You sit between the CEO and the delivery team ensuring all work is tracked, assigned, quality-checked, and completed to standard before it ever reaches a client. You are also the voice of Reviewly to our clients, writing update
s, managing expectations, and representing the business professionally in every communication.



There are three equally important dimensions to this role:



1.  Build the system. Our Taskade environment needs to be structured properly, with the right boards, templates, workflows, and staff dashboards so every tea
mber knows exactly what they own and when it is due. You will lead this build-out and design it to scale.



2.  Run and enforce the system. Once built, you are responsible for making sure the team actually uses it, every task logged, every update recorded, nothing tracked in
s or verbal conversations. The system only works if it is used consistently, and that accountability sits with you.



3.  Represent the business to clients. You will write operational update
s directly to Australian business owners, not templated copy-paste messages, but genuine, accurate, professional communication that builds client confidence. Your English must be strong enough that your
s cannot be distinguished from those written by a native speaker.



You must understand SEO well enough to know when work has been done correctly, not just whether a task is ticked off. That distinction is what separates a true Operations Manager from a scheduler.



?

What You Will Do



Taskade System Build-Out & Enforcement — Priority One

This is the first and most urgent focus of the role. We have Taskade in place but it is not being used to its full potential. You will:



?  Audit the current Taskade setup and identify what is missing, inconsistent, or not being used

?  Design and build a proper board structure, one shared team view for all client work plus individual dashboards per staff member so each person sees their own tasks clearly

?  Create standard task templates for recurring deliverables, monthly reports, GBP posts, audits, onboarding, so nothing is built from scratch each time

?  Set up automated reminders, due date triggers, and status workflows so the system drives accountability without manual chasing

?  Train each tea
mber on how to use their dashboard and enforce consistent usage from day one

?  Ensure the system always reflects the true current state of all client work, if it is not in Taskade, it does not exist



Task & Workflow Management

?  Own daily oversight of all active client tasks across the team

?  Ensure every task is logged, assigned, and has a clear owner and due date before work begins

?  Monitor progress proactively and follow up before deadlines are missed — not after

?  Flag stalled, blocked, or overdue tasks immediately, do not wait for them to become client problems



Quality Verification

?  Review all work before it is communicated to clients,  this is non-negotiable

?  Use your SEO knowledge to assess whether deliverables genuinely meet quality standards, not just whether they look complete

?  Return substandard work to the tea
mber with specific, clear correction instructions

?  Confirm all deliverables match the scope agreed with the client before anything is sent



Client Communication — You Are the Voice of Reviewly

This is not a back-office role. You will write directly to Australian business clients on behalf of Reviewly. Every
 you send reflects the professionalism and credibility of the agency. Your communication must be accurate, timely, and written to a standard that builds client trust, not erodes it.



?  Write professional client update
s in your own words, clear, accurate, and natural. Not templates. Not translated. Not AI-generated without your own review and refinement.

?  Manage all routine operational client communication across active accounts, progress updates, delivery confirmations, timeline changes

?  Proactively update clients before they need to ask, a client who has to chase an update is already losing confidence

?  Handle client questions about work in progress with confidence and accuracy, knowing enough about SEO to answer correctly without always escalating

?  Escalate client concerns, scope questions, or disputes to the CEO with full context and your recommended approach, never pass problems up without your own assessment

?  Maintain a professional, warm, and consistent tone that reflects well on Reviewly in every interaction



File & Information Management

?  Maintain organised client folders in Google Drive using our 8-folder standard structure and naming convention

?  Ensure strategy notes, access details, and client documentation are always current and findable

?  Enforce file management standards across the team, consistency is expected, not optional



Team Coordination & Leadership

?  Lead daily|weekly internal operational meetings with clear agendas and outcomes

?  Assign tasks clearly so every tea
mber knows exactly what they own

?  Address delivery issues directly with tea
mbers before escalating to the CEO

?  Escalate performance concerns with evidence and context, not just complaints



AI Automation & Cost Saving — Bonus Opportunity

We have a dedicated internal drive for AI tools and automation. We are actively looking for ways to reduce manual effort, cut operational costs, and free up staff time for higher-value work. This is an area where the right person can make a significant impact and be financially rewarded for it.



?  Proactively identify repetitive manual tasks across client delivery and internal operations that could be automated

?  Propose and implement AI-assisted workflows, using tools like Claude, Taskade automations, Zapier, or other platforms, that save measurable time or reduce cost

?  Document every automation win clearly: what was automated, estimated time saved per week, and the business impact

?  Identify tasks or processes where AI can reduce reliance on manual staff effort and present those findings to the CEO with a clear business case

?  Stay current with AI and automation tools relevant to SEO agency operations and bring ideas to the table proactively — we want someone thinking ahead, not waiting to be asked



????  Bonus structure: Where your AI or automation proposals result in verified time savings or measurable cost reductions, you will earn a performance bonus. The more you save the business, the more you earn. This will be agreed in writing before your start date.



What This Role Is NOT



?  A general VA or admin support role — you are coordinating a delivery team and holding them accountable

?  A role for someone who waits to be told what to do — we need someone who sees problems before we do

?  A role where SEO is optional or background knowledge — it is your quality-checking foundation

?  A role where Taskade is just a to-do list — you will architect and enforce it as our operational system

?  A short-term or trial position — we want someone who will be here in two years

?  A role for someone who is uncomfortable with AI tools — we are actively automating and we need you to lead that, not resist it

?  A role where client
s are an afterthought — you are the professional voice of Reviewly and your written English will be assessed before you are offered the position



?

What We Require



Essential — You Must Have All of These

?  Minimum 2–3 years working inside an SEO agency (not solo freelance, you must have managed or coordinated work within a team)

?  Solid working knowledge of Local SEO, GBP optimisation, NAP consistency, citation building, local pack rankings

?  Solid working knowledge of Technical SEO, audits, crawl issues, GSC, redirect mapping, site health

?  Understanding of content SEO, brief quality, on-page optimisation, assessing content completeness

?  Demonstrated experience building or structuring a project management system, not just using one someone else set up

?  Experience with Taskade, Asana, ClickUp, Monday, or a comparable tool at an administrative or setup level

?  Experience managing and enforcing team usage of a shared system, you know how to get people to actually use the tools

?  Google Shared Drive experience, maintaining organised, structured shared file systems

?  Excellent written English, this is non-negotiable. You will be writing directly to Australian business clients. Your
s must be professional, natural, and accurate. If English is not your first language, your written communication must be indistinguishable from a native speaker. We will assess this from your application.

?  High attention to detail,  you find the mistake before the client does

?  Ability to manage multiple active client accounts simultaneously without tasks falling through the cracks

?  Comfortable working independently and remotely, you do not need to be micromanaged to deliver



Highly Regarded — Will Strengthen Your Application

?  Familiarity with subdomain or multi-location SEO strategies (satellite sites, )

?  Experience working with Australian, UK, or US SEO agencies or clients

?  Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT, or similar, bonus points if you have built automations or prompt workflows for agency operations

?  Experience with Zapier, Make (Integromat), or other automation platforms connected to project management or CRM tools

?  Knowledge of Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, Semrush, or Screaming Frog at a reporting/review level

?  Experience managing Google Business Profile at scale across multiple client accounts



Tools We Use



?  Taskade — central task and project management system (you will build this out)

?  Google Drive — structured shared file management across all clients and internal operations

?  Google Business Profile & Google Search Console — core SEO platforms

? 
 & Slack — team and client communication

?  Claude / AI tools — internal automation and systems (we have a dedicated internal drive for this)

Plus SEO Tools for staff audits and records.



How We Will Know You Are Succeeding

After 90 days in the role, you will be on track if:



?  Taskade is fully structured with clear boards, staff dashboards, and recurring task templates and the whole team is using it consistently

?  All active client tasks are logged, assigned, and up to date at all times, the CEO can check the board at any 
nt and see exactly what is happening

?  No client deliverable has been sent without your quality verification

?  The CEO has not had to chase an operational update — she receives them proactively from you

?  Client satisfaction is maintained and issues are resolved before they escalate

?  Google Drive is consistently organised and tea
mbers can find what they need without asking



What We Offer



?  $1,500–$1,700 USD per month, based on your SEO experience and agency background

?  Permanent full-time employment, we are building a long-term team, not rotating contractors

?  A role with genuine scope, you will design and build our operational infrastructure, not just maintain someone else's work

?  Direct access to the CEO,  no layers of management, decisions get made quickly

?  Clear systems, documented expectations, and a business that is actively investing in better tools and automation

?  Performance bonus tied to AI and automation savings, verified time or cost savings you generate earn you additional income, agreed in writing before you start

?  An Australian employer with a track record of treating remote staff fairly and paying reliably

?  A genuine opportunity to shape how the business uses AI, we have a dedicated internal systems drive and we want someone who will help us build it out



How to Apply

??  Read every instruction below before applying. Applications that skip steps or ignore instructions will not be reviewed. Attention to detail is the core requirement of this role, your application is the first test of it.



Please include all of the following in your application:



?  Your CV or resume, include any SEO agency roles clearly with dates and responsibilities

?  A short cover message (3–5 sentences), tell us specifically why your SEO agency experience makes you right for this role

?  Your expected monthly salary in AUD 

?  Confirmation you are available to work Australian business hours (AEST / AEDT)

?  Your answers to ALL FOUR scenario questions below,  write at least 3–4 sentences for each (Scenario 4 requires a full
)



Scenario 1 — Operations & Quality

You are managing 8 active SEO clients. One client's monthly report is due tomorrow. The tea
mber responsible tells you at 4pm today that the report is not finished and they need more time. What do you do, and how do you handle the client communication?



Scenario 2 — Taskade & System Enforcement

You join a team that has Taskade set up but staff are not using it consistently , tasks are being tracked in
s and WhatsApp messages instead. The CEO wants everything in Taskade within 30 days. Walk us through how you would approach this. What would you build first, and how would you get the team to actually change their behaviour?



Scenario 3 — AI & Automation

You notice that each month the team spends around 3 hours manually compiling client reports from multiple sources. Describe how you would approach automating or streamlining this process using AI or other tools. What would you investigate first, what tools might you consider, and how would you measure whether your solution actually saved time?



Scenario 4 — Client Communication (Write the Actual
)

A client
s you on a Friday afternoon asking why their Google Business Profile views have dropped this month compared to last month. The tea
mber responsible has not yet investigated. Write the actual
 reply you would send to the client right now. Do not summarise what you would write, write the full
 as you would send it.



????  Scenario 4 is your written English and client communication test. We will read it exactly as your clients would. Write it naturally, no notes, no dot points, just the
. This is how we will assess whether your English and client-facing skills meet our standard.



??  Applications without answers to all four scenario questions will not be reviewed. There is no single correct answer for Scenarios 1–3 — we want to see how you think. Scenario 4 will be assessed on professionalism, clarity, and natural English.



  Reviewly Pty Ltd  |  
  |  Australian company  |  Hiring from the Philippines
salary: $1,500–$1,700 USD per month based on SEO

title: Facebook Ads Specialist (Lead Generation)
description:
We’re looking for a
 Ads Specialist to manage lead generation campaigns for our med spa clients. This role is highly focused on creative testing  working with our team to produce and test new ad creatives weekly with the goal of keeping cost per lead under $10.



WHO WE ARE

Aesthetic Acquisition is a 5-star rated marketing company working with med spas across Australia and the United States. We provide a done-for-you client acquisition program where we manage the entire process of bringing new patients into our clients’ clinics — from generating leads to contacting them and booking them directly into their schedule.



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Manage and 
 ad campaigns for our med spa clients, with the goal of consistently keeping cost per lead under $10



- Work closely with our team to create, test, and launch new ad creatives weekly, testing UGC ads, AI UGC, Before & afters, Graphics - must have experience with these



- Monitor campaign performance daily and make optimisation decisions based on key metrics such as CPL, CTR, CPM and conversion rates



- Identify winning creatives, while quickly turning off underperforming ads



- Launch new campaigns for new clients, including ad setup, creative implementation and & funnel integration



- Maintain accurate campaign tracking and update performance metrics

title: Medical Scribe / Documentation QA (EHR Quality)
description:
About Us

We’re building a global talent pool of exceptional remote Medical Scribes / Documentation QA Specialists to support partner clinics across Australia, the US, the UK, New Zealand, and beyond. These clinics deliver modern healthcare through telehealth and digital services—often combining general practice with wellness, integrative care, and allied health support.



Our shared mission is simple: make healthcare more human—by supporting clinicians with accurate, consistent documentation so patients receive safe, continuous care and clinics can operate with confidence.



If you’re detail-oriented, privacy-minded, and love creating clean, clinician-ready charts, we’d love to meet you.



Role Overview

As a Medical Scribe / Documentation QA (EHR Quality), you’ll help ensure patient charts are complete, accurate, and easy for clinicians to use. Depending on clinic assignment, your work may include real-time or near-real-time scribing during telehealth visits, post-visit documentation cleanup, and ongoing chart audits to maintain consistent standards.



This is a pooling/talent pipeline role. Successful candidates may be matched to open roles with clinics based on:

 • Your scribing and documentation experience (telehealth, in-person, specialty exposure)

 • Your preferred shift coverage (AU/UK/US)

 • EHR systems you’ve used (or your ability to learn quickly)

 • Compensation alignment and expected workload volume

Note: You do not provide medical advice. You support documentation quality, workflow efficiency, and compliance-minded recordkeeping.



What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

 • Create or refine visit documentation using clinic templates (e.g., SOAP, HPI, ROS, assessment, plan, patient instructions).

 • Scribe during or immediately after telehealth visits when assigned (accurate, concise, clinician-ready).

 • QA charts for completeness: required fields, signatures, coding support fields (if applicable), and follow-up tasks.

 • Standardize formatting and terminology while preserving the clinician’s intent and clinical accuracy.

 • Ensure documentation supports continuity of care: clear next steps, follow-up timelines, and patient education notes.

 • Flag missing information or documentation risks to clinicians using a structured escalation workflow.

 • Maintain consistent use of tags, problem lists, medication lists, allergies, and history updates (per policy).

 • Support clinic documentation standards: macros, templates, smart phrases, and style guides.

 • Perform periodic chart audits (sample-based) and report trends: common misses, training needs, template gaps.

 • Coordinate asynchronously with clinicians and ops teams for corrections and handoffs.

 • Protect patient privacy and follow confidentiality/security practices at all times.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 3+ years of experience in medical scribing, clinical documentation, medical transcription, chart auditing, or similar healthcare documentation roles.

 • Strong written English with excellent grammar and ability to summarize accurately.

 • Familiarity with medical terminology and common documentation structures (SOAP, HPI, etc.).

 • High attention to detail—able to spot inconsistencies, missing fields, and documentation gaps.

 • Comfort working inside EHR/EMR systems and following structured templates.

 • Ability to work fast without sacrificing accuracy, especially under time pressure.

 • Strong privacy mindset (healthcare confidentiality, minimum necessary access, secure handling).

 • Remote-ready: reliable attendance, self-management, and proactive communication.

 • Reliable home setup: quiet workspace, stable internet, and secure device practices.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

 • Telehealth scribing experience (live or near-live).

 • Experience with any EHR/EMR (e.g., Best Practice, Halaxy, SimplePractice, Athena, DrChrono, Kareo, Practice Better, etc.).

 • Experience supporting multiple specialties (primary care, allied health, integrative care, mental health, pain, sleep).

 • Familiarity with documentation compliance expectations and chart audit processes.

 • Exposure to ICD-10/CPT basics or clinical coding support (not required; depends on clinic assignment).

 • Strong template-building skills (macros, smart phrases, standard note formats).

 • Experience working with international teams and time zone handoffs.



Tools/Systems Familiarity (Examples)

 • EHR/EMR: any system (training provided per clinic); comfort learning new workflows quickly

 • Collaboration: Google Workspace, Slack/Teams, Notion/Trello/Asana

 • Documentation aids: approved templates, smart phrases/macros (clinic-specific)

 • Voice (if used): VoIP platforms for live visits (clinic-specific)



Work Setup & Scheduling (PH-based)

 • Location: Philippines (remote)

 • Shift options: Vary by clinic assignment

 • AU/NZ-friendly (PH day shift)

 • UK-friendly (PH late afternoon/evening)

 • US-friendly (PH night shift)

 • Preference for candidates who can commit to consistent overlap windows and provide clear async updates.



Compensation (General Guidance)

Starts at USD 10/hour. Higher rates may apply for:

 • strong scribing track record (telehealth/live)

 • demonstrated QA/auditing experience

 • speed + accuracy at volume

 • experience building documentation templates/macros

Some clinics may offer incentives based on accuracy and turnaround time.



How to Apply (Required)

Please submit:

 1. CV / Resume

 2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

 • Your documentation/scribing background

 • EHR systems you’ve used (or how you learn new ones fast)

 • Your preferred shift overlap (AU/UK/US)

 • Your approach to accuracy, privacy, and fast turnaround

 3. Optional but strongly recommended: 1–2 anonymized writing samples (remove all identifying/patient data), such as:

 • a sample SOAP note you created, or

 • a “before/after” documentation cleanup example



Important: Do not submit any document containing real patient identifiers.



Our Screening Process (What to Expect)

 • Initial screen (English writing + documentation experience + remote readiness)

 • Practical test (timed): create a structured note from a mock transcript + QA checklist

 • Structured interview: scenarios on accuracy, privacy, clinician collaboration, and handling missing info



Join the Pool

If you take pride in clean charts, love structured work, and want to help clinicians deliver better care through excellent documentation, we’d love to hear from you.

description:
The Mission: Turn Potential into Performance

We have a solid team of remote guest support, but we are currently missing a results-driven leader to unify them. We don’t need a "boss" to watch the clock; we need a high-level operator who can walk into a workflow, identify bottlenecks, and execute solutions immediately.



If you are a high-achiever who gets frustrated by mediocrity and thrives when given the authority to make things happen, this is your seat.



Why Top Leaders Join LuxoStays

Performance-Driven Pay: Your income is tied to your impact. Hit your KPIs and eliminate attendance issues to trigger aggressive bonuses and/or base pay increase.



Full Operational Authority: You aren't just following SOPs; you are rewriting them. You have the green light to overhaul team culture and demand excellence.



AI-Powered Efficiency: We lead with tech. You will be expected to use ChatGPT, Claude, and AI automation to outpace the competition and streamline guest services.



Growth Path: As we scale our San Francisco portfolio, your role and compensation scale with us. We reward loyalty and results with regular salary appraisals.



Your Objectives (The "Leg Work")

Strategic Team Calibration: We have a diverse team with varying work styles. You must be able to channel high-energy performers into productive outcomes while motivating and empowering quieter tea
mbers to take more initiative.

Zero-Tolerance for Misses: Take full ownership of guest satisfaction. If there’s an attendance or performance "miss," you diagnose the root cause and fix it—period.

KPI Mastery: Track, analyze, and pivot based on data. If the numbers aren't moving, you find the "why" and implement the "how."

Process Engineering: Use AI to automate the mundane so the team can focus on five-star guest experiences.



What You Bring

3+ Years of Real Leadership: You’ve managed remote teams and know how to hold people accountable.

STR/Airbnb Expertise: You understand the high-stakes, 24/7 nature of short-term rentals.

AI Proficiency: You use ChatGPT or similar tools to generate high-quality content, reports, and responses at 10x speed.

Unshakeable Work Ethic: Available for weekends and escalations. You lead from the front.



The Package

Negotiable Base + KPI Bonuses: We pay for results, not just hours.

Attendance Incentives: Significant bonuses for a "perfect" team record.

Rapid Appraisals: Performance and salary reviews every 6 months for "A-Players."

title: Youtube Video Editor for Young Female Entrepreneur - Business, Travel & Behind-the-Scenes Content
description:
YouTube Channel · Video Editor — Job Description



About the Role

We're looking for a video editor to join the Tiffany Parra YouTube team — a fully remote team of 6 people creating content around digital marketing, ecommerce, and what it actually takes to build and scale an online business.



Tiffany bootstrapped her Shopify brand to $11M+ in lifetime sales and $2M+ in annual revenue, driving $700K–$800K from SEO-driven traffic alone in under a year. Her content is direct, practical, and honest — sharing real numbers, real failures, and real systems.



This is an ongoing role with consistent work available. Long-form videos are the core deliverable, with short-form content (Shorts/Reels) available in between.



About the Channel

You can explore the channel 
 on YouTube



Content covers:

Ecommerce and Shopify SEO strategy (keyword intent, collection/product page structure, content marketing, backlinks)

Real case studies from scaling a high-ticket online store organically

Personal brand content — setbacks, rebuilds, and transparent storytelling

Day-in-the-life, travel (currently traveling), fitness, and behind-the-scenes business content



The tone is direct, grounded, and transparent — not corporate, not over-polished. Think smart editing that enhances the story without stealing the show.



What You'll Do

Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–10 minutes) from raw footage + a detailed scene-by-scene editor brief

Cut for pacing and clarity — keeping content tight and engaging throughout

Add b-roll, text overlays, captions, motion graphics, and animated callouts per brief specs

Match the brand's color system and visual style consistently across all videos

Edit short-form vertical content (YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels) as it becomes available

Incorporate feedback efficiently and hit turnaround deadlines



What the Briefs Look Like

Our editor briefs are detailed and scene-by-scene — covering transcript, text overlays, b-roll direction, motion graphics specs, sound effects, brand colors, and asset links. Here's a real example: View Example Brief.



Briefs include: brand color hex codes, font specs (Inter Bold 700), animation style references, sound effect cues, screen recording links, logo/asset sources, and full transcript with timestamps. You won't be guessing — but you do need to be able to execute independently from a written spec.



And here's an example of a finished video so you can see what we're going for: Watch Example Video.



What We're Looking For

Must-Haves

Experience editing YouTube content — especially talking-head or educational/lifestyle hybrid videos

Able to execute from a detailed brief: text overlays, motion graphics, split-screens, animated callouts, sound FX

Strong sense of pacing — you know when to cut and when to breathe

Comfortable working independently from written specs without hand-holding

Reliable, communicative, and meets deadlines

Portfolio or links to YouTube edits you've done



Nice-to-Haves

Experience editing in the business, marketing, or personal finance creator space

Comfortable with short-form vertical editing (Reels, Shorts)

Experience with motion graphics — animated text callouts, logo reveals, diagram builds

Ability to flag missing assets or unclear brief sections before starting rather than mid-edit



Compensation & Logistics

Pay: $15–$30 per long-form video (8–10 minutes), based on experience

Short-form content compensated separately as it becomes available

Fully remote — work from wherever you are

Ongoing role with consistent volume — this isn't a one-off project

Team of 6; collaborative and async-friendly

Starting ASAP



How to Apply

Send us the following:

2–3 examples of YouTube videos you've edited (links preferred)

A brief note on your editing style and what you enjoy working on

Your current turnaround time for an 8–10 minute video from a detailed brief

Your preferred editing software



Send all material to 
 with the subject line: EDITOR-YOUR NAME



We'll review applications on a rolling basis and reach out to set up a short test edit for top candidates. Watch the example video and review the example brief before applying — we'll ask about both.

We’re building Inner Fire slowly and intentionally:

mbers — someone organized, dependable, and hands-on — to help us build strong financial foundations.

title: Content Virtual Assistant (LinkedIn & Podcast)
description:
Content & Podcast VA

Banking Accelerator (by rareliquid) is the go-to coaching program for ambitious finance professionals breaking into investment banking and top-tier finance careers. We produce high-quality YouTube content, run a finance podcast, and build an engaged community of aspiring bankers and investors.

We're growing fast and need a sharp, detail-oriented VA who can help us turn raw ideas, interviews, and video scripts into polished content - and keep our content engine running smoothly behind the scenes.

This role is a strong fit for someone who's organized, takes initiative, has a good eye for what makes content work, and can write well enough to draft posts that actually sound like a real person.



Responsibilities

- Take our YouTube video scripts and turn them into LinkedIn post drafts (first pass with Claude AI, then adapted to match our writing style and voice)

- Write LinkedIn posts based on new ideas as they come up, or around specific things like a podcast episode or something happening in the industry

- Research podcast guests (bankers, investors, PE professionals, recruiters) and build briefing docs with background info and a tailored set of interview questions, then coordinate sending those to the guest ahead of the recording

- Handle guest outreach and all the admin that comes with it — cold outreach, follow-ups, scheduling, confirmations

- Watch podcast episodes after recording, find the most interesting and engaging parts, and send timestamped notes to the editor

- Find b-roll for YouTube videos and Reels — this includes watching interviews and videos featuring bankers, investors, and finance firms and pulling the strongest clips that work for content

- Schedule and publish posts and short-form video across LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram



Requirements

- Strong written English — you can produce clean, human-sounding copy and edit AI drafts until they don't read like AI

- Highly organized with solid async communication — you stay on top of tasks and flag things early without needing to be chased

- Comfortable doing research and turning raw information into clean, structured docs

- Experience supporting a YouTube channel, podcast, or content creator is a plus

- Background or genuine interest in finance is a plus, but strong execution skills matter more



Compensation & Schedule

- $8–$12/hr depending on experience, paid hourly with tracked hours

- 10–20 hours per week, fully remote and async-first

- Flexible schedule — we care about output, not when you're online



This is a part-time contract role with strong potential to grow into something bigger as rareliquid grow as a brand.



Send a short application to 
 with:

- A 3-5 sentence intro about yourself and why this role fits

- One example of content you’ve helped create or manage (link or attachment)

- Your availability and preferred hourly rate

- A video loom introduction is optional, but a plus

title: Online Math Tutor (Full-time)
description:
FULL-TIME ONLINE MATH TUTOR

Stable Salary + Lesson Bonuses | Long-Term Position



A for Effort is a premium tutoring center based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We support students from international schools studying programs such as IB, IGCSE, and other international curricula.



We are expanding our online tutoring team and are looking for a reliable full-time online Math Tutor based in the Philippines. All lessons are in English.



This is a full-time long-term position, not freelance tutoring. We are looking for serious long-term tutors who can commit to completing the academic school year to ensure continuity for our students.



WORKING HOURS

Tutors must be available during our teaching hours:



Weekdays

1:00 PM – 9:30 PM Jakarta time (GMT+7)



Saturdays (if lessons are scheduled)

9:00 AM – 4:30 PM Jakarta time



Schedules may vary slightly depending on lesson bookings.



When tutors are not teaching, they will participate in:



• lesson preparation

• tutor workshops

• academic training

• tea
etings



LESSON FORMAT

Lessons are conducted one-on-one or in small semi-private sessions (maximum 2 students).



COMPENSATION

Base salary: PHP 26,000 per month.



Class bonus: Tutors also receive additional bonuses per class, based on the number of lessons taught.



Tutors are guaranteed the base salary at all times. In addition, tutors receive additional monthly bonuses according to the number of lessons they teach.



Full compensation details will be discussed during the interview.



ROLE

You will teach up to middle school and high school math students in one-on-one online lessons. All lessons are in English



Experience with IB, IGCSE, or A-Level mathematics is preferred. However, strong math tutors who are willing to learn these curricula with training are also encouraged to apply.



REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication skills

Confident teaching middle and high school math

Reliable internet connection

Quiet teaching environment

Professional and punctual

Interested in long-term stable employment



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



We only consider personalized applications that clearly respond to this job posting. Please include the following information in your message:



- Your teaching experience

- Math topics or grade levels you are comfortable teaching

- Availability for full-time teaching role

- A short introduction about yourself



Please include the word AFETUTOR in the first line of your message so we know you read the full job description.



OPTIONAL DEMO LESSON

Applicants may include a short 5–10 minute demo teaching video explaining a math concept . This is optional but helps your application stand out.



NOTE

If you are stronger in elementary homeroom subjects (Math, Science, English) rather than advanced math, please check our Elementary Tutor position also listed.

title: Detail-Oriented Virtual Assistant (Accounting Education Platform) – Immediate Start, Paid Test Task
description:
Hello!



My name is Lee. I’m an accounting instructor and entrepreneur building an online learning platform that helps college students across the United States succeed in accounting.



We are building a system that turns textbook problems into high-quality study tools and practice questions for students.



Your work will directly help students prepare for exams and improve their confidence in difficult accounting courses.



This is detail-oriented work that requires focus, consistency, and the ability to follow a process carefully.



Bonus if you enjoy structured, repetitive tasks and improving systems. If you want to contribute to a real education platform helping students succeed, I would love your help. 



Important Instruction (Please Read Carefully)



To confirm that you carefully read this post, please begin your application message with the word: Collegiate



Applications that do not include this word will not be considered.



Responsibilities



You will follow a clear process to help build course materials for accounting students.



Tasks include:



• Import textbook problem screenshots into our system

• Generate new problem variants using our tools

• Perform quick quality checks to ensure formatting is correct

• Approve assets and send them to the question bank generation step

• Export question banks (CSV files)

• Import question banks into our learning platform (LearnWorlds)

• Paste final activity links back into our system for tracking



You will be provided with short SOP videos that walk through each step.



The process is structured and repeatable.



Tools You Will Use



• Google Sheets

• Google Drive

• LearnWorlds (course platform)

• Our internal dashboard system



No accounting knowledge is required.



Paid Test Task



We will begin with a paid test task.



You will be assigned one chapter to process using the provided instructions.



We will evaluate:



• accuracy

• attention to detail

• speed

• ability to follow instructions



Top performers will be hired for ongoing work building additional courses.



Ideal Candidate



You are likely a great fit if you:



• are extremely detail-oriented

• enjoy following structured workflows

• are comfortable learning new tools

• work efficiently and independently

• communicate clearly when questions arise



Speed and accuracy are both important.



Schedule



We are looking to start the test task next week.



Some applicants may be invited to begin sooner depending on availability.



Long-Term Opportunity



This project will expand into multiple accounting courses.



Strong performers may receive ongoing work building course content and helping maintain the platform.



How to Apply



Please send a message including:



Confirmation that you can follow structured processes carefully



Your availability over the next week



A short sentence about why detail-oriented work suits you



And remember to begin your message with the word Accountancy so I know you read the full post.



Thank you very much for considering this role. Your work will directly support students learning accounting across the United States.



I appreciate your help and look forward to meeting applicants!



— Lee

title: Creative Director - E-commerce (Luxury Brand)
description:
Before anything else…



We can definitely tell when a message feels overly dependent on or fully generated by AI. Nothing wrong with using AI (we all do!), but if you really want to stand out, we’d love to hear your voice. Your taste. Your thinking. Your creative energy.



!! How to Apply (Read Carefully) !!

Incomplete applications won’t be reviewed. If you’re applying for a Creative Director role, attention to detail and the ability to follow direction is kind of the bare minimum.



1. Use “Creative Director” as your
 subject line.

2. In your message, include: A short introduction about yourself

3. A link to your resume and portfolio

4. Your availability to start

5. Your desired starting rate ($/hour)



JOB TITLE: Creative Director



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead the creative direction and execution of Cabana’s visual identity across all platforms

- Drive the design of products, packaging, campaigns, website visuals, and digital content

- Collaborate cross-functionally to tell one cohesive brand story

- Review, refine, and elevate all creative output to ensure luxury-level consistency

- Translate strategy into stunning visuals that capture the heart of our audience

- Inspire and guide the design team while staying hands-on when needed



Bonus: Step in as Brand Designer for key campaigns or special projects



Qualifications:

- 2–3+ years of experience in art direction, brand design, or creative leadership

- Strong portfolio showcasing visual identity work across digital and print

- Mastery of design systems, typography, color, and composition

- Experience in lifestyle, luxury, or wellness brands

- Detail-oriented, collaborative, and obsessed with visual storytelling

- Strong project management skills — able to run projects end-to-end and keep timelines tight



Bonus:

- Good sense for copywriting (you think visually and verbally)

- Proficiency in Figma, Framer, or similar tools



Why Work with Cabana?

- Work from anywhere that sparks your creativity

- Flexible schedule (just a few shared US hours for collaboration)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- Supportive, no-drama team

- Build a luxury wellness brand that blends science with style



Role Overview:

At Cabana, design isn’t just how we look, it’s who we are.



As our Creative Director, you’ll shape and elevate Cabana’s visual world across every touchpoint — from our website and campaigns to packaging and branded experiences. This role is about bringing beauty, intention, and storytelling into every pixel.



You’ll collaborate closely with our Brand Designer, Front-End, and Web teams to bring our luxury wellness vision to life. Every detail should feel thoughtful, modern, and unmistakably Cabana.



Perfect for someone who lives for aesthetics, thrives on creative energy, and knows how to turn a brand into a feeling.





About Cabana:

Cabana is where science meets style, a modern luxury wellness brand redefining what it means to look and feel your best. We offer science-backed treatments like GLP-1s and hormone therapies, helping people live with more confidence, energy, and ease.



We’re building something beautiful. At Cabana, you won’t just design visuals, you’ll help shape a world where wellness feels elevated, effortless, and deeply personal.
