title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $3–$8+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $60 per video!!

Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Student Success & Onboarding Coordinator
description:
Role Overview

We're seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage our student onboarding process and coach coordination. You'll be the crucial link between new students, coaches, and our leadership team, ensuring smooth onboarding experiences and providing ongoing support throughout the student journey.



Key Responsibilities



Student Onboarding & Communication

- Monitor and process new student enrollments from close to full onboarding

- Send personalized welcome messages to new students via Circle (using personal account under rareliquid work
)

- Review student onboarding form submissions for completeness and quality

- Request additional information from students when needed and identify gaps in the onboarding form

- Continuously improve the onboarding form based on student interactions and unique needs

- Create comprehensive student situation summaries following established SOPs and quality standards

- Notify leadership when student summaries are ready for coach matching



Coach-Student Coordination

- Create Circle groups connecting students with their assigned coaches and leadership

- Send introduction messages using established templates and frameworks

- Coordinate scheduling by collecting student availability and ensuring calls are booked

- Follow up to confirm students have scheduled their coaching sessions

- Monitor the student-coach connection process from assignment through first call



Coach Onboarding & Support

- Support new coach onboarding by coordinating system access and setup

- Assist coaches with personal folder organization, calendar setup (Calendly), and platform access

- Verify completion of onboarding checklists (Circle access, onboarding form data access, materials access)

- Facilitate communication between new coaches and the team



Content & Administrative Support

- Format and distribute weekly market newsletter from FactSet to Circle platform

- Maintain weekly job application tracker by visiting bank websites and updating Excel with current links

- Send out feedback forms periodically to collect student and coach feedback



Ongoing Customer Support

- Provide continuous support to students throughout their entire journey with the program

- Monitor and organize student feedback and support ticket submissions

- Identify and escalate issues requiring leadership attention

- Act as the primary point of contact for student questions and concerns



Required Skills & Qualities

- Exceptional attention to detail - You'll be reviewing forms, creating summaries, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks

- Proactive communication - Comfortable reaching out to students and coaches, following up, and keeping everyone informed

- Process-oriented mindset - Ability to follow SOPs precisely while identifying opportunities for improvement

- Strong organizational skills - Managing multiple students and coaches at various onboarding stages simultaneously

- Customer service excellence - Warm, professional communication style that makes students feel supported

- Tech-savvy - Comfortable with platforms like Circle, Slack, Calendly, and form management tools

- Problem-solving ability - Identifying when information is missing and determining the best way to obtain it

- Quality focus - Ensuring all summaries and communications meet established



Tools & Platforms You'll Use

- Circle (community platform)

- Slack (team communication)

- Onboarding forms and data management systems

- Google Drive/workspace for documentation 



Reporting Structure

- Direct coordination with Admin team for coach-student matching

- Collaboration with Admin team for HR and systems setup

- Independent management of day-to-day student and coach communications



Ideal Candidate

You're someone who thrives on creating smooth, positive experiences for others. You love the satisfaction of checking boxes, following processes, and seeing people successfully connected and supported. You're naturally organized, anticipate needs before they arise, and take pride in being the reliable person who keeps everything running smoothly behind the scenes.



Position Type: Virtual Assistant (Remote)



Key Success Metrics: Student onboarding completion rate, time-to-first-call, student satisfaction, coach onboarding efficiency.



Compensation: $7/hr



Start with 25-30 hours/week, structured as:

- Guaranteed 25 hours minimum

- Available up to 40 hours as needed

- Review after 60 days to adjust to full-time or keep flexible



How to Apply

If you’re interested, please
 
 with:

- Your resume

- A brief paragraph on why you’re interested in the role



About The Banking Accelerator

The Banking Accelerator helps students, graduates, and early-career professionals secure investment banking roles at top firms. The program provides personalized guidance on recruiting strategy, networking, resume and cover letter optimization, interview prep, and technical training.



About rareliquid

The Banking Accelerator is a subsidiary of rareliquid, a company with a mission of helping people build their ideal careers through world-class content and educational products. rareliquid was founded in January 2021 and currently has 204K+ subscribers on YouTube:

title: Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist
description:
We're Hiring: Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist



Looking for a hungry, results-driven professional who thrives on building relationships and generating opportunities. If you love the hunt for quality prospects and want to be part of disrupting the e-learning industry, this role is for you.



We're scaling fast and need someone who can consistently deliver high-quality leads while building the foundation of our sales pipeline. This is your opportunity to get a front-row seat as we help e-learning creators reach multiple 7-figures.



Part-time role: 4 hours/day, 5 days/week (EST hours)



What We're Looking For:

We're looking for a Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist who will own the entire front-end of our sales process. You'll be responsible for identifying, researching, and engaging high-quality prospects for our e-learning partnerships.



You'll work directly with our Sales Chief to build a consistent pipeline of qualified leads who are ready to explore growth partnerships with us.



The ideal person is:

- Hungry and results-driven: someone who gets energized by hitting targets

- Speaks English (fluency not required)

- Available during EST business hours for collaboration and prospect engagement

- Coachable and systematic: willing to follow proven processes and continuously improve

- Research-savvy: able to identify and qualify high-potential prospects efficiently

- Personable and persuasive: comfortable with cold outreach and building rapport quickly

- Detail-oriented: maintains clean data and follows up consistently

- Growth-minded: wants to learn, develop skills, and grow with a high-performing team



Key Responsibilities:

1. Lead Generation & Research

- Generate 20 high-quality leads per week that match our ideal client profile

- Research e-learning creators, course creators, and info-product entrepreneurs

- Identify prospects with existing audiences and revenue potential

- Maintain accurate lead data and qualification notes in our CRM

2. First-Touch Outreach

- Execute personalized outreach campaigns following proven scripts and frameworks

- Craft compelling initial messages that generate replies and interest

- Use multiple channels 
, Instagram, etc.) to connect with prospects

- Personalize each interaction based on prospect research and positioning

- Track and optimize open rates, reply rates, and engagement metrics

3. Follow-Up & Nurturing

- Execute consistent follow-up sequences according to our SOPs

- Engage prospects in meaningful conversations about their growth challenges

- Qualify prospects and move them through our pipeline stages

- Collaborate with Sales Chief on lead management and strategy

- Maintain detailed interaction logs and next-step planning

4. Pipeline Management

- Manage prospect relationships until they're ready to book a sales call

- Coordinate handoffs to our sales team for qualified prospects

- Update CRM daily with accurate lead status and interaction history

- Provide weekly reporting on lead generation and outreach performance



About 7th Acquisition

7th Acquisition partners with e-learning creators to help them grow and scale their businesses sustainably. We focus on info-product businesses, working through strategic partnerships that include revenue share and equity collaborations.

Rather than acting as a traditional agency, we work alongside our partners as co-founders and growth collaborators, supporting both acquisition (sales & marketing) and operations to build long-term success.



Our Mission

To help creators build impactful businesses with healthy profit margins, businesses that thrive without being solely dependent on the creator’s time, allowing them to reach and transform more lives.



Commitment & Compensation

Schedule:

- 20 hours per week (4 hours/day, 5 days/week)

- EST business hours preferred

Fully remote

- Compensation:

title: Online Elementary Tutor  (Math, Science, English - Full-time)
description:
FULL-TIME ONLINE ELEMENTARY TUTOR

Stable Salary + Lesson Bonuses | Long-Term Position



A for Effort is a premium tutoring center based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We support students from international schools studying programs such as IB, IGCSE, and other international curricula.



We are expanding our online tutoring team and are looking for a reliable full-time Elementary Tutor based in the Philippines. All lessons are in English.



This is a full-time long-term position, not freelance tutoring. We are looking for serious long-term tutors who can commit to completing the academic school year to ensure continuity for our students.



WORKING HOURS

Tutors must be available during our teaching hours:



Weekdays

12:00 PM – 8:30 PM Jakarta time (GMT+7)



Saturdays (if lessons are scheduled)

9:00 AM – 4:30 PM Jakarta time



Schedules may vary slightly depending on lesson bookings.



When tutors are not teaching, they will participate in:



• lesson preparation

• tutor workshops

• academic training

• tea
etings



LESSON FORMAT

Lessons are conducted one-on-one or in small semi-private sessions (maximum 2 students).



COMPENSATION

Base salary: PHP 26,000 per month.



Class bonus: Tutors also receive additional bonuses per class, based on the number of lessons taught.



Tutors are guaranteed the base salary at all times. In addition, tutors receive additional monthly bonuses according to the number of lessons they teach.



Full compensation details will be discussed during the interview.



ROLE

You will teach elementary to early middle school students in one-on-one online lessons. All lessons are in English.



Subjects may include:

• Math

• Science

• English (general English, not ESL)



Tutors should be comfortable teaching multiple elementary subjects, and math up to early middle school level.



REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication skills

Comfortable teaching elementary students across multiple subjects

Reliable internet connection

Quiet teaching environment

Professional and punctual

Interested in long-term stable employment



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



We only consider personalized applications that clearly respond to this job posting. Please include the following information in your message:

 • Your teaching experience

 • Subjects and grade levels you are comfortable teaching

 • Availability for full-time teaching role

 • A short introduction about yourself



Please include the word AFETUTOR in the first line of your message so we know you read the full job description.



OPTIONAL DEMO LESSON

Applicants may include a short 5–10 minute demo teaching video explaining a simple concept to an elementary student (for example fractions, multiplication, or basic science). This is optional but helps your application stand out.



NOTE

If you specialize in middle school or high school mathematics, please check our Math Tutor position also listed.

title: Sales Rep – Warm Leads Only – No Cold Calling – $300–$800 Weekly Potential
description:
We are hiring multiple sales reps this week and interviewing immediately.

This is a SALES role for people who want to earn commissions and bonuses.

We are hiring confident phone sales representatives with excellent English to work from home for a stable US-based weight loss company.

If you enjoy sales, competition, and earning commissions, this job can pay very well.

You will be calling warm leads only.

Customers have already:

• Started an order

• Requested information

• Opted in to be contacted

You will NOT be cold calling strangers.

Your job is to help interested customers complete their order and earn commission on every sale.



Pay and Earnings

Base Pay: $3.50 per hour

PLUS

• Sales commission

• Daily bonuses

• Weekly bonuses

• Sales contests

Base pay averages $140 per week ($300-$800 average), as commissions and bonuses increase earnings significantly.

Typical total earnings:

Average reps: around $300 per week

Strong performers: $400–$600 per week

Top performers sometimes reach $800+ per week

Many reps earn more from commissions and bonuses than their hourly pay.

This position is ideal for people who enjoy sales and increasing their income through performance.



What You Will Do

• Call warm leads who abandoned their order

• Speak with customers interested in weight loss

• Answer basic questions

• Guide customers to complete their purchase

• Send payment links if needed

• Follow up with interested customers

This role focuses on closing sales and helping customers complete orders.



Work Schedule

Monday – Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time (USA)

Includes:

• 1 hour unpaid lunch

• 2 15 minute unpaid breaks



Requirements

• Excellent spoken English (very important)

• Confident and energetic 

• Sales personality and positive attitude



Technical Requirements

• Noice cancelling USB headset (wired)

• Reliable high-speed internet

• Must connect directly to modem with ethernet cable (no WiFi)

• Quiet home workspace

• Windows or Mac computer capable of Zoom or Google Meet calls



Sales Experience

Previous phone sales experience is preferred but NOT required.

We will train confident applicants with strong English and a great attitude.



Work Environment

• Fully remote (work from home)

• Stable US company

• Long-term opportunity

• Competitive sales environment

• Daily and weekly bonuses

• Sales contests and incentives



How to Apply

To help us identify strong applicants, please include the word “Closer” in the first sentence of your application.

Also include:

Your previous work experience

A short paragraph explaining why you would be good at phone sales

A 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself in English

Applicants with strong English will be prioritized.



Immediate Hiring

We are interviewing and hiring multiple sales reps immediately, with a start date of March 23rd.

If you are confident on the phone and want to earn more through commissions and bonuses, we encourage you to apply.

title: Account Manager (Remote) — Work With Global Clients at Pearl Lemon
description:
Tired of managing accounts where you’re treated like a middleman instead of a strategic partner?



At Pearl Lemon, our Account Managers sit at the center of growth. You won’t just relay messages between teams and clients — you’ll drive relationships, guide strategy, and help businesses across the world scale through digital marketing, lead generation, PR, and emerging ventures.



About Pearl Lemon



Pearl Lemon Limited is a UK-registered company (Company No.
) headquartered at 152–160 City Road, London EC1V 2NX. Founded in 2016 by entrepreneur and TEDx speaker Deepak Shukla, the company has grown into a global, remote-first agency ecosystem spanning SEO, B2B lead generation, PR, gaming, professional services, and hospitality brands.



Our international team works across multiple continents supporting clients in industries ranging from finance and SaaS to legal services and e-commerce. With strong inbound demand driven by SEO and content marketing, our account management team focuses on nurturing relationships and delivering measurable results.



What You’ll Do



As an Account Manager, you will be the trusted advisor for our clients and the internal champion for their success.



Key responsibilities include:



• Managing client relationships and ensuring smooth communication between clients and delivery teams

• Leading onboarding calls and setting clear expectations for campaigns and outcomes

• Monitoring campaign performance and ensuring client goals are achieved

• Coordinating with SEO, outreach, content, and sales teams to execute strategy

• Identifying upsell and cross-sell opportunities within the Pearl Lemon ecosystem

• Maintaining detailed records in CRM systems and reporting on account performance

• Acting proactively to solve problems and strengthen long-term partnerships



What We’re Looking For



We’re searching for someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment and enjoys working with international clients.



Ideal candidates will have:



• 2+ years experience in account management, client success, or agency environments

• Strong communication and relationship-building skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously

• Analytical thinking and a results-driven mindset

• Experience with digital marketing, SEO, or lead generation (preferred but not essential)

• Comfort working remotely with distributed teams



Why Join Pearl Lemon



Working with Pearl Lemon means joining a company that moves fast, experiments constantly, and values entrepreneurial thinking.



You’ll gain:



• Exposure to clients across multiple industries and countries

• A fully remote working environment with a global team

• Opportunities to grow into senior client strategy or leadership roles

• Hands-on learning across marketing, sales, and operations

• A culture that values accountability, transparency, and continuous learning



If you’re someone who enjoys building strong relationships, solving problems, and helping businesses grow — this role will put you right at the center of that impact.



Ready to Apply?



If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and become part of a team helping companies around the world grow faster and smarter.

description:
We work with founders from around the world who operate businesses across multiple jurisdictions, including Dubai, the United States, and Europe.



We are looking for a highly organized and experienced Accountant with strong Zoho Books expertise to manage bookkeeping, financial records, and reporting for our clients.



Role Overview



As a Zoho Books Accountant, you will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling transactions, and preparing financial reports for multiple companies.



You will work closely with the operations and compliance teams to ensure all financial data is properly recorded and organized.



This role requires someone who is detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple clients simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage bookkeeping for multiple client companies using Zoho Books

• Record and categorize financial transactions accurately

• Perform monthly bank and payment processor reconciliations

• Prepare monthly financial reports and summaries

• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a senior industry leader across both a consulting practice and a creative music career. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and enjoys balancing strategic business support with creative coordination.



The Executive Virtual Assistant will act as a trusted right hand, managing day-to-day operations, scheduling, communications, and project coordination. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to multifamily operations, PropTech, and consulting work, while also supporting initiatives within the music industry. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, resourceful, and comfortable handling multiple priorities with discretion and professionalism.





Consulting & Business Operations Responsibilities: 



* Social Media & Content Management: 

Manage LinkedIn content calendar following established weekly posting strategy

Schedule and publish content across platforms using Dripify and other automation tools

Monitor engagement and flag opportunities for relationship building



* Podcast Scheduling & Coordination: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for PropTech Pulse (multifamily PropTech) and Purpose Built (personal transformation) podcasts

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and pre-interview logistics

Coordinate recording schedules and send calendar invitations

Prepare guest briefing materials and episode outlines

Track episode pipeline and maintain production calendar

Coordinate podcast promotion across social channels for all shows



* Speaking & Workshop Development: 

Research and apply to speaking opportunities at industry conferences (NMHC, NAA, Apartmentalize, regional events)

Track submission deadlines, requirements, and follow-up communications

Promote and book workshops, managing logistics and attendee communications

Coordinate The Diplomat's Table quarterly executive events



* CRM & Client Nurturing: 

Maintain CRM database with accurate contact information and engagement history

Execute nurturing sequences for prospects across six LinkedIn outreach lanes

Schedule discovery calls via Calendly Professional

Prepare briefing documents for client meetings



* Administrative & Financial: 

Manage calendar and scheduling using Microsoft Outlook

Prepare and send monthly client invoices

Track accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments

Compile monthly business reports and KPI tracking

Handle
 correspondence and prioritize inbox



* Website & Digital Platform Management: 

Coordinate website design and development projects with designers/developers

Manage website content updates, blog posts, and landing pages

Set up and maintain virtual training platform (course uploads, user management, content organization)

Manage ecommerce platform for workshops, courses, and digital products

Monitor platform performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate technical support

Track enrollment, sales metrics, and customer inquiries



* Music Career Responsibilities: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for House Call music podcast

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and recording logistics for House Call

Manage social media presence and content calendar for music brand

Research and submit tracks to record labels and A&R contacts

Submit songs to playlist curators (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

Coordinate release promotion campaigns for new tracks

Track streaming metrics and engagement across platforms

Research marketing opportunities and music industry events





Required Qualifications:

7+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a marketing/communications support role

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field preferred

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail

Proficiency with LinkedIn, social media scheduling tools, and CRM platforms

Experience with website content management systems (WordPress, Squarespace, or similar)

Familiarity with online course platforms (Thinkific, Teachable, Kajabi) and/or ecommerce tools

Strong written and verbal communication skills with professional polish

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

Self-starter who anticipates needs, takes initiative, and operates with minimal supervision

Experience coordinating podcasts, media appearances, or content production





Preferred Qualifications:

Experience supporting executives in professional services, consulting, or thought leadership roles

Familiarity with real estate, PropTech, or B2B industries

Background in music industry marketing, artist management, or entertainment

Experience with invoicing, basic bookkeeping, or accounts receivable

Knowledge of conference speaking circuits and event promotion





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

description:

title: Client Support Specialist – B2B / SaaS (Remote – AU Clients / Philippines)
description:
Client Support Specialist – B2B / SaaS (Remote – AU Clients / Philippines)

 

Australian-Owned Company | Work Life Safety Systems (WLSS)

Work Life Safety Systems (WLSS) is an Australian-owned company supporting businesses with professional safety and compliance solutions.

We are seeking a high-performing Client Support Specialist to support Australian B2B and SaaS clients. This role requires excellent written English, strong administrative capability, and confidence working with professional documentation and CRM systems.



This is a mid-to-senior level remote role for professionals who enjoy structured work, client communication, and producing high-quality documentation.

We value clarity, reliability, and professionalism, and this role is best suited for applicants who meet these standards.



About the Role



This position is communication-heavy and documentation-focused, supporting Australian clients remotely.

You will handle client correspondence, CRM management, document preparation, reporting, and administrative coordination.



Attention to detail, professionalism, and following structured workflows are essential.



Key Responsibilities

• Respond to inquiries and support Australian B2B clients

• Write and format professional
s, reports, and documentation

• Create structured documents using Microsoft Word

• Maintain reports and spreadsheets using Microsoft Excel

• Prepare presentations using PowerPoint

• Work across Microsoft 365 (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, SharePoint)

• Manage contacts, records, and activities within HubSpot CRM

• Perform administrative coordination and support tasks

• Follow documented service processes and workflows

A Typical Day in This Role

A typical day may include:

• Responding to client
s and inquiries from Australian B2B customers

• Preparing or formatting professional documents, reports, or client communications

• Updating and maintaining records within HubSpot CRM

• Reviewing service requests and coordinating administrative tasks

• Updating spreadsheets or reports in Microsoft Excel

• Attending short internal meetings via Microsoft Teams

• Ensuring documentation and records are accurate and up to date

• Following internal workflows and service processes



This role suits someone who enjoys organized work, clear communication, and maintaining high standards in documentation and client service.



What Success in This Role Looks Like



The successful candidate will be able to:

• Communicate clearly and professionally with international clients

• Produce well-structured documents and reports

• Maintain accurate CRM records and administrative documentation

• Follow processes and workflows with strong attention to detail

• Work independently while maintaining high professional standards

Required Skills & Experience

• Minimum 3+ years experience in Customer Service, Client Support, or Administrative roles

• Experience supporting international or B2B clients

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Advanced Microsoft Word document formatting and layout skills

• Strong working knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint

• Experience using HubSpot CRM or similar CRM platforms

• Strong administrative and organizational skills



Experience supporting SaaS platforms or technical services is highly regarded.

Before Applying



Please ensure you are comfortable with the following:

• Writing professional client
s in English

• Creating structured documents in Microsoft Word

• Managing reports or data in Microsoft Excel

• Using CRM systems such as HubSpot



If you are confident in these skills, we encourage you to apply.

Remote Work Requirements



• Minimum 40 Mbps download / 20 Mbps upload internet connection

• Backup internet connection

• Dedicated quiet workspace suitable for remote work

• Professional headset with microphone

• Reliable computer capable of supporting full-time remote work

Salary & Benefits

• ?40,000 – ?55,000 per month depending on experience

• Performance-based incentives

• Full-time remote role

• Supportive Australian management team

• Ongoing professional development

• Long-term career growth with potential progression to Senior Client Support / CSO roles



Application Requirements



To apply, please submit:

• Resume (Word and PDF format)

• A 2-minute video demonstrating either:

How you would write and format a professional client
, or

A step-by-step walkthrough explaining a software process

Please also include 2–3 sentences in your own words explaining why your experience is suitable for this role.

Include the video link in your application. Applications without the required video will not be reviewed.

Application Instructions



To confirm you have read this job description carefully:

• Begin your application with the word “WLSS”

• Use the subject line Client Support Specialist – WLSS

Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be considered.

About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. title: Peer Support Facilitator for Athletes, Surfers, Divers, and Movement Practitioners
description:
Hello,



My name is Ken. I am Filipino and currently working as a nurse in California in the United States.



I am building a platform called AfterShiftSessions. The idea came from seeing how many professionals, athletes, and people going through major life transitions experience burnout and pressure but often do not have a space to talk things through.



AfterShiftSessions is not therapy and not coaching.



It is structured peer conversations between people who have lived through demanding seasons of life and can offer grounded perspective and presence.



Sessions usually last 20 to 60 minutes and are simple supportive conversations where you listen and hold space for someone going through a transition or difficult season.



This is flexible remote work. You choose your availability and take sessions when they are booked through the platform.



Payment is per completed session.



We are especially interested in candidates with backgrounds in movement or outdoor activities such as:



Running or endurance sports

Yoga or meditation practice

Surfing

Freediving or scuba diving

Climbing or mountaineering

Strength training or CrossFit

Coaching or movement instruction



People who spend time in movement, water, nature, and endurance environments often develop strong emotional awareness and the ability to stay calm during challenging 
nts.



Ideal candidates are people who:



Have experienced burnout, career transitions, relocation, or major life changes

Have a background in sports, movement, or outdoor activities

Are emotionally mature and able to listen without trying to fix people

Are comfortable speaking on video calls

Want flexible remote work



You do not need certifications. This role is based on lived experience and emotional maturity.



To apply please answer the following:



1 Tell us about your sport or movement background

2 What major life transition have you personally navigated

3 Why this role resonates with you

4 Your availability per week

5 One example of helping someone simply by listening



Thank you and I look forward to hearing your story.



Ken

Founder

AfterShiftSessions

title: Creative Video Editor + Social Media Assistant
description:
Creative Video Editor + Social Media Assistant

(Music, Storytelling, Travel Content)



We are looking for a creative video editor and social media assistant who enjoys storytelling and helping content reach a wider audience. You will be working with musicians, storytellers, and creators to help turn meaningful 
nts into engaging videos for social media.



This role is not just about editing clips. We are looking for someone who enjoys thinking creatively about how content can perform well online, identifying great 
nts in videos, and turning them into short clips that people want to watch and share.



If you enjoy music, storytelling, travel, and creative media, this could be a great opportunity to grow with a team producing meaningful content.



This is a long-term role for someone who enjoys creative work and wants to grow with a team producing music, storytelling, and travel content.



Projects You May Work On



You may help create content for projects including:

Jason Tonioli – pianist, composer, and recording artist

Glenn Rawson – historian and storyteller

Successful Musicians Podcast

Amazing Vacations USA – travel and adventure experiences

Additional musicians and creative projects working with Jason and his team



We also own and operate a recording studio and regularly work with musicians and artists who need help creating video and social media content around their music.



These projects include music performance videos, storytelling videos, travel content, interviews, and educational media.



Responsibilities | Your work may include:



Editing short-form videos (15–90 seconds) for social media

Creating clips for:

Instagram Reels

YouTube Shorts


TikTok

Editing 3–7 minute story videos for the Glenn Rawson Stories project

Turning longer videos into engaging short clips

Adding captions, graphics, and music

Editing video from podcast interviews

Helping brainstorm creative content ideas

Assisting with social media planning, scheduling, and posting

Collaborating with artists and creators to ensure content is consistently planned and published

Identifying strong hooks and storytelling 
nts in videos



We are looking for someone who is creative and proactive, not someone who simply waits for instructions.



Skills We Are Looking For:

Strong video editing ability (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar)

Experience creating short-form social media content

Understanding of storytelling and pacing

Ability to create engaging hooks in the first 3 seconds of a video

Ability to add captions and basic motion graphics

Familiarity with social media posting and scheduling

Good written English communication



Bonus experience:

Editing music performance videos

Editing travel or adventure content

Story-driven video editing

A love of music (especially piano) is a plus.



Preferred Background (Not Required):

Some projects include inspirational and historical content. Applicants who are members of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints may find this work especially meaningful. However, this is not required, and all qualified applicants are welcome to apply.



Compensation



Starting pay: $3.00 per hour

There is potential for increased hours and compensation as you demonstrate strong performance and creative contribution.



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



1. Loom Video (Maximum 90 Seconds)



Create a Loom video (90 seconds or less) where you:

Share your screen

Show at least 2 examples of video or creative work you personally created

Briefly explain your role in each project

Show the editing timeline for at least one project



Somewhere in your Loom video, please mention the word “studio.”



2. Portfolio Links



Provide at least 3 links to videos or creative work that you personally created or edited and are proud of.



These may include:

Video edits

Social media content

Graphic design

Reels or YouTube Shorts



3. Social Media Experience



Please include:

A link to your personal social media account

Links to any accounts you have helped manage or create content for



4. Research Assignment



Before applying, please research AT LEAST ONE of the following projects. These are all companies and creators you will likely be working with in some way if you are selected for the job:

Jason Tonioli

Glenn Rawson

Successful Musicians Podcast

Amazing Vacations USA



This role may involve working on or collaborating with all of these projects, so this step helps both of us determine if this would be a good fit.



After reviewing them, please provide:



Two ideas for content that could improve the
 or Instagram presence for ONE of these projects.

You do not need ideas for all of them — just choose the project that interests you most.



Explain:

What the content would be

Why it would perform well

Why you would be a good person to help create this content



Final Step

When submitting your application, please use the following format in the subject line:



OVER DELIVER | Your Name | Loom Link



Example:



OVER DELIVER | Maria Santos | loom link



Applications that do not follow this format may not be reviewed.



We look forward to seeing your work and learning more about your creative abilities.

title: Data & Automation Support Specialist
description:
Train Together is looking for a Data & Automation Support Specialist to join our Innovation and Technology team. This role will support the development of our internal dashboards, automation systems and AI-driven processes that help our teams work smarter and make better decisions. 



You will work closely with the team responsible for building our Power BI dashboards, automation workflows and AI tools, helping to maintain systems, gather feedback from users and improve how data is used across the business. 



This is an exciting opportunity for someone who enjoys working with data, automation and emerging technology and wants to help build innovative systems that improve productivity across a growing organisation. 



Key Responsibilities 



(1) Dashboard & Data Support 



- Provide support for internal dashboards and help maintain existing reports 

- Gather and organise feedback from staff using dashboards to identify improvements 

- Track common issues and help prioritise fixes that improve productivity 

-Document key fields, calculations and data definitions to support dashboard maintenance 



(2) Power BI Support 



- Make minor dashboard updates such as formatting, labels and tooltips 

- Assist with testing dashboards before and after updates 

- Support the documentation of measures and reporting logic to ensure dashboards remain maintainable 



(3) Automation & AI Systems 



- Build and maintain basic Power Automate flows 

- Monitor automation processes and troubleshoot errors 

- Support the development of AI-assisted systems such as automated reporting and workflow alerts 

- Assist with testing and refining AI-driven processes within the organisation 



(4) Training & Adoption 



- Support the rollout of new dashboards and tools to staff 

- Help create simple training materials such as guides or videos 

- Coordinate training sessions and collect user feedback 

- Provide first-line support to staff using new systems 



Required Skills & Experience 



- Experience working with Power BI and/or Power Automate 

- Comfortable learning and working with new digital tools 

- Strong organisational skills and ability to track tasks and improvements 

- Good written communication and documentation skills in English UK 

- Ability to troubleshoot issues and support colleagues using new systems.



Desirable Skills 



- Experience with Excel or data analysis 

- Basic knowledge of DAX or data modelling 

- Experience with automation tools or AI systems 

- Familiarity with version control tools such as Git



What You’ll Be Helping Build. This role will support the development of: 



- Internal Power BI dashboards for business reporting 

- Automation workflows that reduce manual work 

- AI-assisted processes that analyse data and improve decision-making 

- Systems that help teams identify issues earlier and work more efficiently

title: Product Designer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience



To apply: Please submit your application through the provided link below:

title: Insurance VA
description:

Location: Remote | Schedule: 8 am to 5 pm US timezone



About Us

We are a U.S.-based insurance agency dedicated to simplifying insurance for individuals and businesses. Our team provides support across multiple lines of coverage, including Property & Casualty, Auto, Homeowners, and Business Insurance. We value proactive service, clear communication, and efficient processes to deliver a seamless client experience.

ntum AMS preferred; experience with Applied Epic, AMS360, Hawksoft, EzLynx, AgencyZoom, or similar systems is a plus), Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace

title: N8N Automation Freelancer (Remote, Flexible)

title: Creator Partnerships Manager (UGC + Automotive Brand Deals)
description:
We are looking for a motivated Creator Partnerships Manager to help grow brand partnerships and UGC opportunities for an established content creator with 400K+ followers across social platforms in the automotive niche.



Our content focuses on automotive culture, car reviews, creator education, and high-quality video production.



Your primary responsibility will be brand outreach and deal sourcing, securing both UGC content opportunities and high-quality automotive brand partnerships.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in influencer marketing, brand outreach, and partnership negotiation who is hungry to close deals and grow with a creator brand.



Primary Responsibilities



• Identify brands that are looking for UGC creators or influencer partnerships

• Send daily outreach
s to brands and marketing agencies

• Pitch partnership opportunities to automotive companies and lifestyle brands

• Secure UGC deals ranging from $500–$3,000+ per video

• Pitch long-term automotive brand deals that can reach four-figure to five-figure partnerships

• Track all outreach, responses, negotiations, and deals in a spreadsheet or CRM

• Follow up consistently with brands and agencies

• Communicate clearly with the creator regarding opportunities and deal progress



Partnership Categories



This role will focus on securing two types of opportunities:



1. UGC Content Deals



These are content creation projects where the creator produces high-quality video content for brands to use in advertisements or marketing campaigns.



These deals do NOT require posting on the creator’s social media pages.



Examples of brands to target:



• Lifestyle brands

• Fashion brands

• Technology products

• Mobile apps and software

• Fitness and wellness brands

• Consumer products

• Food and beverage brands

• Travel brands

• Men's grooming brands



The goal is to secure multiple UGC deals per month, typically ranging from $900–$2,500+ per video.



2. Automotive Brand Partnerships



These deals involve collaborations that will be posted on the creator’s social media platforms.



These partnerships must be high-quality automotive brands.



Examples include:



• Car detailing brands

• Automotive accessories

• Dash cam companies

• Car technology companies

• Tire brands

• Performance parts companies

• Automotive lifestyle brands



These partnerships should aim for larger campaigns or long-term collaborations, often reaching four-figure to five-figure deals.



Requirements



• Strong
 outreach experience

• Understanding of influencer marketing and UGC campaigns

• Experience pitching creators or brands preferred

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us

We’re building a global talent pool of results-driven remote Marketing Specialists to support partner clinics across Australia, the US, the UK, New Zealand, and beyond. These clinics deliver modern healthcare through telehealth and digital services—often combining general practice with wellness, integrative care, and allied health support.



Our mission is simple: help more people access care through ethical, patient-first marketing—clear, cal
ssaging that builds trust and turns interest into bookings (without hype or misinformation).



If you love turning campaigns into measurable growth and can work with structure in a healthcare setting, we’d love to meet you.



Role Overview

As a Digital Marketing Specialist (Growth + CRM), you’ll support clinic growth across the funnel—ads (if assigned), landing pages,
/SMS automation, and reporting. You’ll collaborate with ops and clinicians to translate services into campaigns that are compliant, conversion-focused, and brand-consistent.



This is a pooling/talent pipeline role. Successful candidates may be matched to open roles with clinics based on:

 • Your strengths (paid ads, CRM/email, landing pages, analytics, partnerships)

 • Your preferred shift coverage (AU/UK/US)

 • Tools you’ve used (Meta/Google, HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Klaviyo, etc.)

 • Compensation alignment and scope



What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

 • Build and execute marketing campaigns to drive inquiries and bookings (organic + paid depending on assignment).

 • Set up and manage
/SMS automations (welcome flows, reminders, reactivation, nurture sequences).

 • Create and optimize simple funnels: lead magnet ? intake ? booking ? follow-up.

 • Support landing page copy/structure and coordinate with design for assets (or create basic assets if skilled).

 • Manage ad performance where assigned (Meta/Google basics): targeting, creatives, budget pacing, A/B testing.

 • Maintain clean tracking and reporting: UTMs, source attribution, weekly dashboards, conversion rates.

 • Coordinate with clinic teams for approvals—especially around healthcare-safe claims and accurate service info.

 • Improve conversion rates through testing (headlines, offers, CTAs, follow-up timing).

 • Ensure patient privacy and consent-based outreach in all CR
ssaging.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 2+ years experience in digital marketing (growth, paid ads,
/CRM, funnels, or performance marketing).

 • Strong written English (clear, patient-friendly messaging and clean grammar).

 • Comfortable working with KPIs (CTR, CPL, conversion rate, bookings, CAC where available).

 • Experience with at least one CRM/email platform (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, etc.).

 • Highly organized: can manage calendars, campaigns, deadlines, and approvals.

 • Remote-ready: reliable internet, strong follow-through, proactive communication.

 • Ethical mindset: understands healthcare marketing must be accurate, respectful, and privacy-safe.



Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points)

 • Experience marketing for clinics, telehealth, health tech, allied health, or wellness brands.

 • Hands-on paid ads experience: Meta Ads Manager and/or Google Ads.

 • Basic landing page building tools (WordPress, Webflow, Unbounce, Leadpages).

 • Analytics comfort: GA4 basics, Looker Studio reporting, conversion tracking.

 • Copywriting experience for landing pages and nurture sequences.

 • Experience with appointment booking funnels and no-show reduction messaging.



Tools/Systems Familiarity (Examples)

 • CRM/Email/SMS: HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, Twilio/Podium

 • Ads: Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads (role-dependent)

 • Analytics: GA4, Looker Studio, UTM tracking

 • Project tools: Notion, Trello/Asana, Slack, Google Workspace

 • Creative support: Canva (basic to intermediate)



Work Setup & Scheduling (PH-based)

 • Location: Philippines (remote)

 • Shift options: Vary by clinic assignment

 • AU/NZ-friendly (PH day shift)

 • UK-friendly (PH late afternoon/evening)

 • US-friendly (PH night shift)

 • Preference for candidates who can commit to consistent overlap windows and provide clear async updates.



Compensation (General Guidance)

Starts at USD 10/hour. Higher rates may apply for candidates who can own:

 • CRM automation + segmentation

 • conversion optimization

 • paid ads + performance reporting

 • multi-clinic campaign management

Some clinic assignments may include bonuses tied to booked consults/leads quality.



How to Apply (Required)

Please submit:

 1. CV / Resume

 2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) covering:

 • Your marketing background and strongest channel (CRM/ads/funnels/content)

 • Tools you’ve used (CRM + ads + analytics)

 • Your preferred shift overlap (AU/UK/US)

 • One measurable result you achieved (with numbers if possible)

 3. Portfolio / proof of work (any of the following):

 • screenshots of campaigns and results

 • sample
/SMS flows

 • landing pages you worked on

 • dashboards/reports you created

Important: Applications without proof of work may not be considered.



Our Screening Process (What to Expect)

 • Initial screen (portfolio + communication + remote readiness)

 • Practical task: mini funnel plan + 2
 drafts + simple KPI targets

 • Structured interview: scenarios on ethical marketing, performance reporting, and improving conversions



Join the Pool

If you’re data-driven, creative, and can market healthcare services with trust and integrity, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant: Global Venue Sourcing and Events
description:
Company: Conference Well

Hours: Part time. 16 hours per week

Monday to Thursday

10:00am to 2:00pm AEST



Opportunity: Potential to increase to full time based on performance



About Conference Well



Conference Well is an Australian boutique venue sourcing company that helps organisations secure hotels and venues for conferences, corporate events and group accommodation around the world.



We work with executive assistants, event managers, procurement teams and CEOs to negotiate the best possible hotel rates and contract terms.



Our clients rely on us to deliver fast, accurate and professional venue proposals.



Conference Well is known for



1. Detailed cost comparison reporting

2. Strong relationships with global hotel groups

3. Fast turnaround. Four venue quotes within forty eight hours

4. Professional client ready proposals

5. Strategic venue advice for corporate clients



Accuracy, professionalism and attention to detail are critical.



Role Overview



You will work directly with the Managing Director to support global venue sourcing operations.



This role requires a high level of organisation, accuracy with numbers and strong written English.



This is not basic admin work. You will be preparing client facing documents and coordinating with international hotels.



Over time the successful candidate will grow into managing venue sourcing projects independently.



Key Responsibilities



Venue and Supplier Coordination



1. Send RFP requests to hotels around the world using prepared templates

2. Follow up hotels regarding availability, pricing and contract terms

3. Track hotel responses and deadlines

4. Maintain sourcing trackers and spreadsheets

5. Coordinate site inspections and hotel meetings where required



Client Proposal Preparation



1. Prepare professional client proposals using existing PowerPoint templates

2. Convert proposals into polished client ready PDF documents

3. Build Excel cost comparison spreadsheets for hotel options

4. Review hotel quotes carefully to ensure pricing accuracy

5. Prepare side by side financial comparisons for clients



Inbox and Executive Support



1. Manage the Managing Director inbox and organise supplier responses

2. Respond to hotels where appropriate using prepared templates

3. Coordinate meetings and calendar scheduling

4. Maintain organised cloud folders and proposal files



Administration and Finance Support



1. Prepare invoices using templates

2. Track accounts receivable and follow up unpaid invoices

3. Maintain organised supplier and hotel contact lists

4. Assist with internal document management



Additional Support



1. Maintain proposal templates and improve internal systems

2. Assist with social media formatting and posting when required

3. Support database management of hotel contacts





Required Skills and Experience



1. Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant

2. Experience working with Australian, US or UK clients preferred

3. Strong written and spoken English at professional business level

4. Exceptional attention to detail

5. Confidence communicating with four and five star hotels

6. Advanced Microsoft Office skills including Excel, PowerPoint and Word

7. Strong Excel skills including formulas and financial comparisons

8. Experience creating professional PowerPoint or PDF client documents

9. Reliable high speed internet connection and quiet workspace

10. Own computer with licensed Microsoft Office installed



Highly Regarded Skills



These are helpful but not required.



1. Experience working in hotels, hospitality or corporate events

2. Experience preparing executive level proposals

3. Experience managing group accommodation or conference bookings

4. Understanding hotel contracts and room block agreements

5. Experience with Adobe PDF editing tools

6. Basic graphic design skills for proposal formatting

7. Experience posting or scheduling social media content





What We Offer



1. Long term working relationship

2. Professional and respectful Australian employer

3. Clear systems and templates already created

4. Opportunity to grow into managing venue sourcing projects independently

5. Potential to increase to full time hours based on performance





Application Requirements



To apply please submit the following.



1. Your updated CV

2. A one minute video introducing yourself and explaining your experience

3. One example of a PowerPoint or proposal you have created

4. One example of an Excel comparison spreadsheet you have built



Your
 subject must include



Conference Pro and your name



Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Application Task 1

Excel Comparison Exercise



Below is a simplified hotel comparison scenario.



A client requires accommodation for forty rooms for three nights.



Hotel A

Room Rate 245 AUD per night

Breakfast included

Tax 12 percent



Hotel B

Room Rate 225 AUD per night

Breakfast 18 AUD per person

Tax 10 percent



Hotel C

Room Rate 260 AUD per night

Breakfast included

Tax 8 percent



Please create an Excel spreadsheet that



1. Calculates the total accommodation cost for each hotel

2. Clearly compares the three options

3. Identifies which hotel is the most cost effective

4. Presents the information in a clean format suitable for a client proposal



Please submit the Excel file with your application.





Application Task 2

Supplier
 Exercise



Write a professional
 to a hotel sales manager requesting a proposal.



Client requirements



Location Singapore

Rooms required 60

Dates 12 May to 15 May 2026

Meeting room required for 120 delegates

Buffet lunch required for two days

Corporate mid range hotel preferred



Your
 should clearly request availability, pricing and meeting space details.





Important



Applications must include



1. CV

2. One minute introduction video

3. Excel comparison exercise

4. Supplier
 example



Applications missing any of the above will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
Hello!



We run a high-end Real Estate Media company in the United States, and we’re looking to bring our video editing in-house.



Many companies outsource editing to large editing teams where you never know who is editing your video. We want the opposite.



We are looking for one dedicated editor to become part of our team and help us create a consistent, premium look across all of our videos.



Our company produces some of the highest quality real estate videos in our market, and video is one of the biggest drivers of new business for us. Because of that, we’re looking for someone who:



• Takes pride in their craft

• Pays attention to detail

• Enjoys being creative

• Stays up to date with video trends

• Can collaborate with our team and offer ideas



We want someone who feels like part of the team, not just another outsourced editor.



This role will start part-time, with the goal of transitioning into full-time as our production volume increases during the busy season.



____



What You’ll Be Editing



Most of our work includes:



• Real estate listing videos

• Vertical Instagram / TikTok reels

• Agent talking-head ads

• Social media marketing content



We focus heavily on high-end, cinematic content and creative storytelling.



____



Skills We’re Looking For



You should be comfortable with:



• Current real estate video editing trends

• Color grading LOG footage (currently Canon C-Log 3)

• Creative transitions and masking transitions

• Speed ramping and cinematic pacing

• Sound design and music selection

• Premium captions and on-screen text

• Parallax and orbit shot flow



Bonus experience:



• Higgsfield AI (for virtual staging and day-to-night effects)

• Day-to-Night transitions

• FPV style transitions



____



Editing Software



Preferred:

• Final Cut Pro



Also acceptable:

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• DaVinci Resolve



What matters most is your editing ability, not the software.



____



Communication



Clear communication is very important for this role.



You should be comfortable with:

• Written English

• Receiving feedback

• Collaborating with our team



____



Test Edit Required (Important)



To apply, please complete a short test edit.



You do NOT need to edit a full video.



A 30–45 second sample edit is perfect as long as it demonstrates:



• Your color grading style

• Music selection

• Sound design

• Creative transitions

• Overall storytelling ability



Test Video Details



Orientation: Vertical



Address:

409 Dorcas Ln, Arlington, TX



Hook (On Camera Script):



“Arlington is one of North Texas’ most vibrant cities. You have AT&T Stadium, Globe Life Park, UTA, some of the best parks and shopping, all within distance of this house actually! That we just listed for $350,000. Less than 10 minutes away from all the entertainment! Let’s go take a look!”



____



Editor Instructions



Please try to include:



• Day-to-Night transition

• Address displayed on screen

• Smooth transitions between parallax/orbit shots

• Speed ramps (in & outs)

• Captions and bold text overlays



____



Music



Choose from this playlist:

Example Videos

title: AI Agents & Automation Assistant
description:
The LLM & AI Automation Analyst is responsible for managing, monitoring, and continuously improving LLM-powered systems, AI agents, and automations, including chatbot applications.



This role sits at the intersection of AI, data, automation, and operations. You will ensure AI systems deliver accurate, reliable, and context-aware outputs by maintaining knowledge bases, refining prompts, monitoring performance, and building automations and reports. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys analytical thinking, process optimization, and working with evolving AI systems.





Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

-Maintain and improve LLM-powered agents, including chatbot workflows, prompts, and response logic



-Design, test, and refine prompts to improve accuracy, consistency, and behavior



-Validate agent outputs across edge cases and real-world scenarios



-Curate, organize, and validate structured knowledge bases, FAQs, and internal documentation used by AI systems



-Ensure knowledge sources remain accurate, up to date, and logically structured



-Review AI conversations and agent outputs to identify errors, gaps, and logic failures



-Define, track, and document quality metrics for AI outputs



-Propose corrective actions based on recurring issues



-Track AI usage, accuracy, resolution rates, escalation rates, and user satisfaction



-Analyze trends and root causes behind performance changes



-Translate insights into actionable improvements



-Build formulas, scripts, and automations to improve AI workflows, reporting, and monitoring



-Use Google Apps Script and APIs to automate repetitive processes



-Assist in creating dashboards and reports to monitor AI performance and adoption



-Ensure leadership has clear visibility into system health and impact



-Maintain clear documentation of AI logic, workflows, automations, and improvement roadmap



-Partner with Data, Operations, HR, and Leadership to align AI capabilities with business needs



-Proactively identify opportunities to improve AI accuracy, efficiency, and reliability







Qualifications

Required:

-1+ year experience working with LLMs, chatbots, or AI-powered systems



-Strong proficiency in Google Sheets for analysis, tracking, and reporting



-1+ year experience using formulas and Google Apps Script



-Ability to analyze AI conversations, logs, and performance metrics



-Experience with prompt engineering and evaluation



-Strong attention to detail and quality assurance mindset



-Understanding of data privacy, access control, and responsible AI practices



-Clear written communication and cross-functional collaboration skills



Nice to Have

-Python for automation or data analysis



-Basic SQL for querying logs or analytics data



-Experience with APIs (REST, JSON)



-Familiarity with BI tools or BigQuery







Technical Stack



Languages

-JavaScript (Google Apps Script)

-Python (optional but valuable)

-SQL (basic)



Tools

-Google Apps Script

-Google Sheets Automation

-LLM / AI platforms (internal or third-party)

-API integrations (REST, JSON)



Data & Reporting

-Google Sheets

-BigQuery (optional)

-Dashboards / BI tools





Key Traits

-Highly analytical and detail-oriented



-Curious and passionate about AI and automation



-Process-driven and optimization-focused



-Proactive and self-directed



-Strong ownership mindset



-Comfortable working with ambiguity and evolving systems



 

Benefits & Perks:

-Strong focus on work-life balance



-Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and automation systems



-Direct impact on product, operations, and customer experience



-Long-term growth path in AI, Data, and Automation



All set to dive into this new adventure?

Please fill out the form so we can proceed with your application:



wkf.ms/4pPRX7N



(Remember to choose AI Agents & Automation Assistant from the dropdown so your application won't get lost!)

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
***WE WILL ONLY ACCEPT APPLICANTS WITH PRIOR CUSTOMER SUPPORT EXPERIENCE IN THE SAAS INDUSTRY.***



About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will serve as the first line of support for our customers, helping them navigate the platform, resolve issues, and ensure they have a smooth experience using our software.



You will handle support tickets, troubleshoot basic issues, and work closely with internal teams to resolve more complex requests. This role also involves identifying recurring issues, improving support resources, and helping enhance the overall customer support experience as our company continues to grow.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage day-to-day customer support inquiries, providing timely, accurate, and professional assistance to customers.



• Address and resolve customer concerns, escalating more complex issues to the appropriate internal teams when necessary.



• Track and organize support requests to help identify trends and opportunities for improving customer support processes.



• Assist in maintaining and updating support documentation and internal resources.



• Support testing and feedback for product updates or improvements when needed.



• Contribute to team initiatives and assist with additional tasks to support overall team success.



Requirements

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) — this is a must.



• Experience supporting customers in a technology, software, or service-based environment, preferably in a fast-paced and growing company — this is a must.



• Previous experience using modern ticketing systems.



• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify patterns and trends in customer issues.



• A proactive and resourceful approach to resolving customer concerns.



• Highly organized and able to manage multiple tasks and priorities.



• A collaborative team player who can coordinate effectively with different teams.



Work Schedule

• This is a full-time job in a permanent work from home setup. You will be working 8 hours a day, 5 days a week.





TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION, FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS BELOW:



• USE “SPECIALIST” AS THE SUBJECT LINE WHEN SUBMITTING YOUR APPLICATION

• ATTACH YOUR UPDATED CV/RESUME

• INCLUDE A SHORT COVER LETTER INTRODUCING YOURSELF



***APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED WITHOUT A LINK TO THEIR RESUME WILL NOT BE REVIEWED***
