title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Job Title: E-commerce Customer Support Specialist

Department: Customer Experience / Operations  Schedule: around 10pm-7am Mon-Fri. Remote/on site are all acceptable.

Reports to: Customer Service Manager



About the Role

We are looking for a stable, detail-oriented, and friendly Customer Support Representative to join our growing e-commerce team.

If you enjoy problem-solving, working in a fast-paced digital environment, and talking to people with a smile (even over the phone), we want to meet you.



Key Responsibilities

1. Inquiry & Pre-Sales Support



Respond promptly to customer inquiries via phone calls and
s regarding product details, shipping costs, and order status.



Provide accurate information to help customers make confident purchasing decisions.



Maintain a nice and friendly tone to ensure a positive brand experience from the first point of contact.



2. In-Sales Support



Assist customers during the checkout process to resolve payment issues or technical difficulties.



Process order modifications (e.g., address changes, item swaps) efficiently before fulfillment.



3. After-Sales & Issue Resolution



Troubleshoot and resolve post-purchase issues such as delays, damaged items, returns, and refunds.



Investigate discrepancies using the ERP system to ensure inventory and order data align.



Handle complaints with patience and empathy, turning negative experiences into positive ones.



4. Tool Management & Documentation



Utilize Zendesk (or similar ticketing systems) to manage, track, and document all customer interactions.



Log all inquiries and resolutions accurately to maintain a clear history for future reference.



Collaborate with the teams via internal notes to ensure smooth issue resolution.

title: Creative Content Producer (Video Editing & Graphic Design)
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled, fast-moving Creative Content Producer to join our team full-time. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced creative environment and can consistently produce high-quality video and visual assets for social media and marketing. 



You’ll be responsible for editing videos and creating creative assets that support our marketing, brand, and social media presence.



This is a hands-on production role where speed, creativity, and quality all matter.





Commitment: Full-time



What You'll Be Doing



Video Production & Editing



- Edit short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts, ads)

- Edit long-form videos (YouTube, podcasts, interviews, etc.)

- Add captions, motion graphics, cuts, sound effects, and transitions

- Optimize content for different social platforms



Creative Asset Design



- Design social media graphics

- Create marketing assets (ads, visuals, promotional materials)

- Design presentation decks and visual slides

- Produce static creative assets used in campaigns





Expected Output



We work at a fast pace and expect consistent production.



Typical weekly output may include:



- 5 edited videos per week (short-form or long-form depending on project needs some)

- 5-10 creative assets per week (graphics, ads, slides, social visuals, etc.)



This role is best suited for someone who can work quickly without sacrificing quality. 



---



What We're Looking For



- Strong video editing skills

- Strong graphic design skills

- Ability to work quickly and independently

- Experience producing high-quality social media content

- Good understanding of modern content styles (TikTok, Reels, YouTube)

- Reliable and able to meet daily output expectations



Bonus Skills



- Motion graphics

- After Effects experience

- Social media content strategy understanding

- AI-assisted creative workflows



---



Tools You Might Use



(You don’t need to use all of these)



- Adobe Premiere Pro

- Final Cut Pro

- CapCut

- Photoshop

- Illustrator

- Figma

title: Figma Website Designer Wanted - Immediate Start
description:
We are currently looking for a creative and reliable Figma Designer to join our team and assist with the design of websites and landing pages for ongoing projects.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating clean, modern Figma designs that will later be developed into fully functioning websites. Our team will provide guidelines, examples, and clear instructions, but we are looking for someone who can also bring their own creativity and design sense to each project.



Most of the websites we design are within the trades and construction industry, including businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, and other similar services. Because of this, experience designing service-based business websites would be very beneficial.



We are looking for someone who can work efficiently and meet relatively quick timelines, as many of our projects move at a fast pace. There will be ongoing work available for the right person who can consistently deliver high-quality designs.



Responsibilities:



• Design website and landing page layouts in Figma

• Follow guidelines and instructions provided by our team

• Create clean, professional layouts that are conversion-focused and user-friendly

• Structure designs so they can be easily developed by our development team

• Ensure designs are organized, consistent, and visually appealing

• Deliver designs within the required project timelines



Requirements:



• Strong experience using Figma for website design

• Good understanding of modern website layout and user experience

• Ability to follow instructions while still contributing creative design ideas

• Strong attention to detail and clean design structure

• Ability to work efficiently under tight timelines

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



To confirm that you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of Figma website designs you have created. If you have examples of trades or construction-related websites (electricians, plumbers, builders, etc.), that would be especially helpful.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and assist with ongoing Figma design work for websites and landing pages.

Edit short-form videos (30–90 seconds) optimized for social platforms.

Add captions, motion graphics, sound effects, and transitions to enhance viewer engagement.

Repurpose long-form footage into high-impact clips.



Requirements:

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a plus).

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

Creative mindset with attention to detail.



How to Apply:

Send your portfolio or samples of your short-form edits, along with a short note about your editing style and experience.

title: Real Estate Research & Admin Support
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant | Real Estate Lead Research & Data Management

Job Overview:

I am a real estate investor based in Miami looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join me for a 1-month trial project. You will act as my "right hand" for data organization and lead research. If you are efficient, reliable, and have a "can-do" attitude, this role has the potential to become a long-term position as my business grows.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Research: Identify and extract property data from public county websites (e.g., Property Appraiser, Clerk of Court records) based on specific criteria I provide.



Data Organization: Maintain and clean lead lists in Google Sheets. You must be comfortable ensuring data is accurate, formatted correctly, and easy to read.



Skip Tracing: Use online tools to find contact information (phone numbers/emails) for property owners.



CRM/Database Management: Input qualified leads into our tracking system (Google Sheets) and update lead statuses daily.



Administrative Support: Help with basic tasks as needed, such as drafting simple
s or organizing digital files.



Requirements:



Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Google Sheets (formulas, filtering, formatting).



Attention to Detail: You catch errors that others miss. Accuracy is more important than speed.



Proactive Problem Solver: If a website is down or a data point is missing, I want you to tell me what alternative path you found, not just stop working.



Communication: Excellent written English. You will provide a short End-of-Day (EOD) report summarizing what you accomplished.



Reliability: You are available to work 20 hours per week and hit your deadlines consistently.



Project Details:



Duration: 1 month (trial period).



Compensation: $5 per hour



Work Style: Remote / Independent Contractor.



How to Apply:

Please send me a message with the following:



A brief summary of your experience with real estate research or data entry.



Your favorite movie (to ensure you read this description!).



Confirmation that you are available to start immediately for this 1-month trial.

title: Senior News & Documentary Video Editor (Full-Time Only)
description:
TWT Unleashed is the social and documentary arm of The Washington Times.



We produce serious, non?hysterical, conservative?leaning news content across TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, and X – plus high?end documentaries and live shows.



We’re looking for a Senior Video Editor who can own the edit, not just take orders.



APPLY HERE: 



What You’ll Own

- Turn raw news, interviews, and live shows into high?retention short?form clips (Reels, TikTok, Shorts, FB Reels).

- Build story arcs from long?form interviews / commentary into multiple clips that keep people watching to the end.

- Add captions, titles, sound design, motion, and B?roll that fit a serious, credible news brand.

- Help shape formats and visual language for the show (what “our look” is on each platform).

- Give clear direction to junior editors or motion designers when needed.

- Work directly with producers to improve turnaround time, formats, and performance over time.



This is a senior seat: you’re expected to make decisions, bring ideas, and build frameworks and templates – not wait for step?by?step instructions.



Schedule & Communication (Non?Negotiable)

- Full?time, 6 days per week, aligned to U.S. news cycles.

- Fixed daily working window with overlap to U.S. daytime.



During working hours you:

- Reply within 15–30 minutes on Slack

- Proactively update: “Draft uploaded,” “Need clarification on X,” “ETA 2 hours,” etc.

- Flag issues early so producers are never surprised by delays.

***If you want strict Monday–Friday, 9–5 with no urgency and no growth, this is not the role.***



Requirements

- 3–5+ years professional editing experience, including short?form for social (TikTok, Reels, Shorts).

- Strong reel of news / commentary / documentary?style work (not just gaming or 
 edits).

- Deep sense of storytelling, pacing, and hook selection for political / current?events content.

- Expert in Premiere Pro and After Effects



Comfortable with:

- Talking?head commentary

- Live show / panel clips

- Fast?moving news and sensitive topics

- Strong written and spoken English.

- Reliable computer and fast, stable internet (large file transfers daily).



What Success Looks Like

You consistently:

- Deliver edits on or before deadline, even with breaking stories.

- Need 1–2 revision rounds max because you understand the brand and tone.

- Increase retention and watch time on key platforms.

- Communicate early if a deadline is at risk and propose solutions.

- Are trusted to set the bar for other editors.

title: VA-Marketing-Real Estate
description:
Part-Time or Full-Time | Remote | U.S. Real Estate Focus

I am seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Marketing Assistant with strong experience in AI tools (ChatGPT, Canva AI, HeyGen), Google Ads, Meta Ads, Brivity, and social media management, and Amazon print on demand product creation.. This role supports a fast growing real estate business by executing marketing tasks, optimizing digital ads, and maintaining consistent online presence across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate is self-directed, creative, collaborative, and fast with tech — someone who can take strategy and turn it into polished, on-brand deliverables without micromanagement.



Key Responsibilities

1. Real Estate Marketing Support

Create, schedule, and manage Brivity SmartPlans, drip campaigns, and automations

Maintain listing marketing tasks in Brivity and update client communications

Responsible for property marketing (listing descriptions, Canva graphics, flyers, social posts, ads, etc.)

Prepare and send weekly seller updates using templates





2. Social Media Management

Schedule, post, and monitor content across:


, Instagram, TikTok*, YouTube*, LinkedIn*, Google Business Profile, Local Services Ads

Repurpose long-form content into short-form and platform-native versions with a heavy reliance on AI

Create and schedule all social media across all platforms

Track engagement metrics and identify opportunities to boost visibility





3. Digital Advertising (Google + Meta Ads)

Set up, manage, and optimize Google Search, Display, and Performance Max campaigns

Manage Meta Ads Manager for listing ads, lead generation, and retargeting

Track KPIs, analyze performance, and report weekly on results

Ensure all ads are Fair Housing compliant and consistent with brand





4. AI-Driven Content Creation

Tools include: ChatGPT, HeyGen, Canva Magic Write, other AI tools as needed

Responsibilities:

Draft social captions, blogs,
 campaigns, newsletters

Convert blogs into video scripts for HeyGen and use AI prompts to repurpose long-form content

Create property marketing materials and social content

Maintain consistency in my voice, tone, branding, and compliance

Update and/or Build SOPs and templates for repeatable workflows





5. Video Editing & Distribution

Use HeyGen to create avatar videos for updates, listings, and educational content

Add captions, branding, and correct formatting for Reels/Shorts/TikTok

Upload videos with optimized titles, descriptions, and SEO-friendly tags

Create vertical and horizontal formats as needed





6. Administrative & Operational Support

Maintain Google Drive organization for files, photos, and marketing assets

Track tasks, deadlines, and marketing calendars

Monitor CRM activity and notify me of hot/warm leads

Help build systems, automations, and checklists for efficiency

Prepare weekly marketing reports summarizing activity and insights







Ideal Qualifications

Experience as a VA in real estate or digital marketing

Strong understanding of Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

Skilled with Brivity (or similar real estate CRM)

Advanced proficiency with ChatGPT, Canva, and HeyGen and other AI tools

Strong English communication skills

Ability to overlap at least 6-8 hours with U.S. business hours

Organized, tech-forward, and able to handle fast turnaround projects





Soft Skills

Creative yet detail-oriented

Strong problem-solving abilities with a solutions-first mindset

Collaborative, open to feedback, and able to work closely with me

Fast learner with strong tech intuition

Independent worker with excellent communication

Highly organized and reliable

Comfortable adapting to new tools and systems





Performance Expectations

Consistent multi-platform posting

High-quality marketing deliverables

Strong ad performance and decreasing cost-per-lead

Clear and proactive communication

Daily reporting on tasks and challenges

Weekly reporting on marketing with insights, not just screenshots

title: Ecommerce Operations Specialist (WooCommerce + Salesforce)
description:
We are a UK promotional merchandise company supplying branded marketing products to global brands including UPS, Bacardi, Lego and William Hill.



We are launching a new ecommerce website in April and are looking for a reliable Ecommerce Operations Specialist based in the Philippines to support the ongoing management and growth of the site.



All product data and pricing are managed in Salesforce and synchronised to WooCommerce. Your role will focus on ensuring this data appears correctly on the website and that the catalogue is organised, accurate and optimised for customers.



This is a long-term remote position with regular weekly work.



Responsibilities



• Manage the WooCommerce product catalogue and product pages

• Ensure products and data coming from Salesforce appear correctly on the website

• Check product attributes, variations and categories are structured correctly

• Manage product images, descriptions and content presentation

• Monitor product data accuracy and catalogue organisation

• Identify and maintain “best seller” product lists

• Monitor competitor websites and identify popular or trending products

• Work with suppliers to obtain product information, images and specifications

• Liaise with our Salesforce specialist regarding product data and system workflows

• Liaise with our SEO specialist to implement internal linking and product page improvements

• Assist with ecommerce reporting and operational improvements

• Support the ongoing development of the new ecommerce website launching in April



Requirements



• Experience managing WooCommerce product catalogues

• Comfortable working with large product catalogues and structured product data

• Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Understanding of ecommerce product attributes and variations

• Ability to analyse competitor websites and product trends

• Good English communication

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Nice to Have



• Experience working with Salesforce or CRM systems

• Experience with product imports or API integrations

• Understanding of ecommerce SEO and internal linking

• Experience working with suppliers or product sourcing







How to Apply



Please answer the following questions in your application:



How many products have you managed in an e-commerce catalogue?



What e-commerce platforms have you worked with (WooCommerce, Shopify, Amazon, etc.)?



Have you worked with product data coming from another system,  such as a CRM or ERP?



To confirm you have read this job description, please start your application with the word CATALOGUE.

title: Pinterest Growth Manager
description:
Hey candidate, my name is Garin Flowers, and I’m so glad you’re here! A little about me - I’m a full-time content creator and TV host based in Los Angeles, California. I run a fast-growing fragrance community on social media where I review fragrances, share tips, and help people discover scents they love.



I’m looking for a Pinterest Growth Manager to help expand my fragrance content onto Pinterest and turn it into a powerful traffic and affiliate platform.



The main focus of this role will be taking my fragrance TikTok content and turning it into high-performing Pinterest pins that attract viewers searching for fragrance recommendations, fragrance reviews, and scent advice.



You will help me make magic happen! You’ll do this by managing the day-to-day operations of my Pinterest account, creating boards and pins, researching trends, and developing a strategy to grow the page and eventually make it profitable through affiliate marketing.



If you’re passionate about social media growth, understand Pinterest strategy, and enjoy working with lifestyle or fragrance content, this could be a great long-term opportunity.

_________________



!!! PLEASE STRICTLY FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS BELOW IF YOU WANT TO APPLY !!!



What I'm Looking For:



PINTEREST + SOCIAL MEDIA GROWTH



- Experience managing Pinterest accounts for creators or brands



- Understanding how to grow traffic through Pinterest SEO



- Skilled in Canva or similar tools for pin design



- Able to post consistently and manage high-volume pin schedules



- Knowledge of affiliate marketing is a huge plus



- Strong research skills for trending topics and keywords



- A creative thinker who can suggest new content ideas



- Organized, proactive, and able to communicate clearly



What I Offer:



- Part time work, 4 hours per day (M-F), $5.50 per hour



- Consistent weekly work that could turn into full time



- Opportunities for raises and additional responsibilities



- A chance to work with a creator building a strong online brand



- A fun, collaborative environment with room to grow



!!! IF YOU ARE CONFIDENT YOU CAN DO THIS JOB, FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS EXACTLY !!!



Apply to this job on OnlineJobs.ph



Send an
 to:



CC my assistant Angel: 



Subject Line:

 "I'm ready to grow your Pinterest"



In the
 include:



- Your resume



- Any Pinterest accounts you have managed



- A short explanation of how you would grow my Pinterest account



- One idea for a Pinterest board you would create for my content



Please Look at My Social Media

This will help you understand the content we will be repurposing:



 

 



What You'll Be Doing:



- Manage the day-to-day operations of my Pinterest account



- Create Pinterest boards and optimize them for growth



- Design and publish pins daily using content I've already created



- Turn my existing content (TikTok, YouTube, newsletters, etc.) into Pinterest pins



- Curate relevant content from other sources and promote using affiliate links



- Research Pinterest trends and keywords to maximize reach



- Develop a growth strategy to increase followers, traffic, and revenue



- Help turn Pinterest into a profitable platform through affiliate marketing



I look forward to meeting you!
